reviews.text:
Mc Cormack & Mc Cormack proceeded to draft a contract to sell 60% of my business without obtaining my consent, relying solely on my ex-partner's word (40% partner)  and greedy purchaser. It is alarming that a lawfirm  would overlook verifying ownership of a business. This is a fundamental failure to follow BASIC  legal principles.

I contacted the office to inquire about  the supposed sale, I was met with blatant disrespect from the receptionist. Despite my understandable frustration regarding the sale of my business without my consent.  Her response was RUDE and inappropriate, telling me to "watch my mouth" when my tone understandably rose due to the circumstances.

Therefore, if you want to sell your neighbors house or business without their consent, contact Mc Cormack and Mc Cormack.
Lacks professionalism when dealing with other industry professionals.
Completely professional and assisted me in closing my home. Highly recommended.
Great feels like family.
Was very good to my sister in her time of need very professional

From start to finish very professional!!
Danielle, Miss Rado throughly explained
what was expected of me and laid out
the strategy of my case. Being my second
ride and being alittle emotional she kept
me focused!! My case was settled and I
was satisfied! Thank you RADO Law🤙🏼

Attorney Rado is very professional and very compassionate!
She explains everything thoroughly step by step! Going through a divorce is so stressful and she made me feel so comfortable and supported me in every way. She fought for me and made sure I got everything I needed to survive on my own!  She didn't leave any stone unturned.  She is honestly the best, I am so glad I was referred to her, and she was able to represent me.
Great experience with your office

I can't say enough about Danielle.  She didn't just represent me but guided me and gave me strength on days when I needed it most.  She was incredibly professional and also communicated with honesty and compassion, explaining every step, making me feel protected.  No question was too small, and she always made me feel heard.  I highly doubt I was her easiest client and she fought for me with a level of dedication that went far beyond what I ever expected from an attorney.  If you're looking for an attorney who will not only advocate for you with the utmost professionalism and will genuinely care about you, then Danielle is for you!  I can not be more grateful for the difference she has made in my own and my kids' lives.  Danielle, from the bottom of my heart, I appreciate you and Thank You Again!

I can not say enough good things about Danielle. Although she wasn’t able to take my case because of where I’m located, she was  thorough, thoughtful and insightful in terms of pointing me in the right direction. She taught me more in my consultation than my previous attorney had reviewed with me in 4 months. She also ensured I was in good hands with an attorney who did handle divorces in my area, and then even followed up with me to make sure I was ok. I wish I could have had her represent me, but even just meeting her as a person was incredibly refreshing given that a divorce is right up there with experiencing a death. I am lucky to have crossed paths with Danielle and highly recommend her to anyone in the Greater Waterbury area.

I highly recommend Attorney Rado if for any reason you need a divorce lawyer. She will fight for you, like she is involved in the outcome, even though she would earn the same rate if she just went through the motions. She is  an excellent lawyer, she’s a pitbull I swear to God. It’s nice to have her on your side. She was recommended to me by another lawyer. When a lawyer recommends a lawyer, you know  that she  is a lawyer who will watch your back. Don’t hesitate, hire Danielle, she’s awesome! 💪👍

Danielle was compassionate, efficient, and respectful. I had gone to other consultations before and they made me feel like I was a difficult project for them to take on. But in the consultation with Danielle, i felt like a person. She took care of everything and made a difficult situation so much easier for me.

I highly recommend Attorney Rado on her professionalism, and expertise in law. She's a Highly affective and supportive individual. SHE BELIEVES YOUR ISSUES ARE IMPORTANT AND SHE LISTENS ATTENTIVELY. An individual who definitely goes above and beyond to FIGHT for you. Especially in the most challenging time in one's life like a divorce. My case was very successful thanks to her. Her office is conveniently located downtown Waterbury CT.  Remember she will be one of the Best investments you can possibly make when one is vulnerable and in dire need of an attorney.

I really couldn’t have asked for better Representation! Attorney Rado provided me the best experience given the circumstances I was dealing with. I HIGHLY recommend her. Attorney Rado will represent you better than you could ever possibly imagine. I’m extremely grateful we crossed paths when we did!

Attorney Rado helped me through one of the most challenging times of my life. I will forever be grateful for the care and compassion shown by her and her staff. She was sensitive to my situation and is extremely knowledgeable. I highly recommend her!

Professional, tenacious, meticulous, and caring is how I can best describe Attorney Danielle Rado.  I had the good fortune to retain Attorney Rado during a tumultuous legal matter.  Immediately I was impressed by her thorough preparation, and detailed review of all relevant facts.  Attorney Rado worked with me leaving nothing to chance to prepare for our court litigation.  Given the situation attorney Rado showed great compassion and really made me feel confident in her every move.  Without a doubt Attorney Rado's years of practicing law and trial experience place her above anyone in her field.  My family and I are forever thank full for Danielle Rado's assistance and highly recommend her services.
Danielle is excellent - efficient, professional, and fair and ethical for both parties
Would not have wanted anyone else in my corner. Highly recommend her. She does not sugar coat anything. Cuts right through the B.S.

I can’t say enough great things about Attorney Rado!!! She is hands down the BEST!  From the beginning of the process to the end, there’s no one that makes you feel more comfortable and who truly cares about your case. She gets results and I wouldn’t trust anyone else but her!
Julie L

I highly recommend Attorney Rado. I cannot express the relief I felt knowing I had such a tireless advocate on my side during my case. My situation could have ended very differently had I not had Attorney Rado representing me. I will be forever grateful to her

I highly recommend Attorney Rado. She represented me and was incredible throughout the whole process. From our first meeting I knew I had an attorney that understood my situation and would fight for the best interests of me and my children. If you're looking for an excellent attorney, you need to hire Attorney Rado.
THANK YOU FOR HELPING ME I REALLY APPRECIATE IT

My workers compensation claim started in 2008   and came to a settlement in 2021.  Jill Rydzik represented me throughout those years.  She went to numerous hearing.  Nothing about my case was easy.  Any time I reached out to her she always returned my calls.  She was amazing throughout the many years she represented me.  She was always kind, caring and compassionate.  I was never pressured in to settling my claim.  The staff in the office represented her office well because they always went above and beyond to help me just as Attorney Rydzic did.  I am forever grateful for all the hard work that the whole firm did for me.  My health was always her first concern.  I can actually say that the day I settled this matter I was very saddened because I felt like I was losing family member. If you want honest, hardworking and caring attorneys this is the firm for you.

I remember when my son was heading to Afghanistan and I had asked her if her firm could handle legal affairs prior to his deployment.  Not only did she handle them she refused to charge him a dime.  She thanked him for his service and told him that was the least she could do.

My case was extremely complex and I was blessed to have such incredible representation.

Lisa Coer

I was injured at work in 2007 and was contacted in 2013 by the insurance company handling my case asking if I would be interested in settling. This law firm came highly recommended and I reached out. Jill handled my settlement and made the whole process go smoothly and quickly. Jill was not only very professional but also genuinely caring. I am very pleased with the service Jill provided and the outcome of that service which was a fair and equitable settlement. I wouldn't hesitate to recommend Jill and this firm.

This practice is absolutely the best especially for workers comp .
My personal experience is with David. He handled my case 30 years ago and continues to ensure cost of living increases occur.
Also all the attorneys and staff are kind and helpful

Jill Ryzdik has been my worker's compensation attorney for many years. She and the staff at the firm are very attentive and respond quickly to my requests and inquiries.  My case is extensive and Morrissey Morrissey and Rydik have and continue to be with me every step of the way!

This firm is amazing!  My personal injury case also involved workers comp, so I had both Andrew Morrissey and Jill Rydzik working on my behalf.  One of my injuries was to my head, which effected my short-term memory.  I was embarrassed by the number of phone calls I made asking the same questions, but they were kind and gentle, and always helped me understand the process as it went along.  They made sure that I never felt overwhelmed, and never felt pressured in any way by the other side.  In the end, I received a much higher settlement than I ever would have imagined!  Thank you, Andrew and Jill, for making sure that the rest of my life is well provided for!  Love you guys!!!

I was injured at work when I was 22,  Andrew has been working with me for 10 years and four surgeries now, I have no idea what I would have done without him and Bev. Workers comp has fought back every step even as far as not approving medications just hours after a surgery, within 5 minutes of speaking with Andy my prescriptions were approved. I can not recommend him enough. He has improved my quality of life by the outstanding job he does making my life easier and relieving the burden of dealing with workers comp.

I reached out to several disability attorneys last summer to see if they could offer any advice on how to approach my administrative hearing.
Jill Morrissey was the only one that would give me a phone appointment.  I hadn't paid anything, and I wasn't a former client - but Jill still took the time to talk with me and answer my questions.  She gave me valuable advice, which I believe helped me greatly in winning my case this January.
It's very rare to find people that genuinely care, especially in disability cases.  If I ever need representation, I know where I'm going.

Thank you!
These folks are professional with a very very talented staff and right on point five stars would have been if they'd be next to my house

I am currently using this law firm for my workman's comp and I would never in my life again.to contact or get in touch is impossible.i show up he is always buzzy I leave voice mails once a WK and he never returns my phone calls.its like once u sign the paperwork u no longer matter and u won't get any information on ur case until he's ready two months waiting to finalize my case and haven't hear nothing from him.said hell he'll send paperwork never got.and can never speak to him worse lawyer I have ever had.
worst lawyers

Andrew Morrissey, Attorney at Morrissey, Morrissey and Mooney, LLC has
done great work in the Naugatuck Area for many years!

Morrissey, Morrissey and Mooney, LLC has been devoted to representing the legal interests of their clients for over 30 years and is considered one of Connecticut’s top law firms.

If you're in need for any legal services and want a credible business and team behind you every step of the way then I would recommend anyone to Morrissey, Morrissey and Mooney, LLC!
Good people end honest.
WILL NOT FIND ,ANY ONE ,UPFRONT AND HONEST,LIKE  ,JIM MULHALL
Very honest attorney. Wont give you the run around. Always returns calls.  Very helpful over the years.

I entered the office about 2 weeks ago & I needed help with a family member. I'll never forget how quickly he addressed my concerns. So easy to talk to & my issues were taken care of within 5 days. Highly recommend. I will be contacting him on future issues. Also reasonably-priced

My father was unexpectedly hospitalized and we needed an attorney to visit him there to sign some important legal documents. Attorney Salvatore prepared the legal documents we requested. Then he gathered two witnesses and all three of them personally visited my father to sign everything. The service was excellent and we finished the entire process within 5 days.

one of the most underwhelming law firms I have dealt with, seemingly prioritizing compensation over providing meaningful work beyond basic paperwork. Salvatore failed to present one piece of evidence provided to him to defend a case and continued to interrupt the judge during the hearing, which appeared to frustrate the judge as well. Extremely unprepared! The most positive thing I can say is he seems nice outside his work and his office assistant is a sweetheart. Other than that be mindful your entire retainer will be taken before you even get to see a judge! I was not represented to my liking at all! End result screwed me more than the other party and now I owe this office even more money!! Of course I was told I had such a strong case though just a bunch of crap !

Salvatore Law Group is EXCELLENT! Patsy was so helpful to my family and fulfilled all of our needs! I highly recommend Salvatore Law Group to anyone who is looking for honest, reputable and reasonably priced legal counsel.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for your review! It was our pleasure to work with you on your legal needs. Grazie Mille!

reviews.text: Best attorney to purchase a house with !
Attorney Rosemary's is the best. I would highly recommend her to anybody looking for a good attorney.

I have used Lane & Lane to both purchase and sell properties. The staff is outstanding - professional and delightful to interact with - and I hope to continue to use their legal services whenever the need arises.
Been a great attorney for all my homes my wife and I bought over the years,  now my 2 boys use them and everyone I know that's  buying a home gets the office #

Amazing job looking out for they clients
So knowledgeable,  responsive,  helpful and kind!

Sean Fitz Maurice is an amazing attorney. I worked with him for my divorce and my experience was wonderful. It was an extremely difficult time and he took the time to explain everything step-by-step. Many lawyers appear to only care about getting paid and not about their clients. NOT SEAN!!! He is a caring and hardworking individual who cares about his clients and their interests. Thank you Sean for all your help.

Sean FitzMaurice excellent divorce attorney. Thank you Sean
Bill & Cheryl

Attorney Brennan represented me in a medical malpractice case.  I shared my story with him and he took my case.  Attorney Brennan had excellent professions assisting in the evaluation of my medical history. I am happy to report that we were successful when the case went to mediation. Attorney Brennan is both a nice person and a great lawyer. The mediator for this case was impressed with his negotiation skills.

Working with Jim Brennan has been nothing short of a blessing. From the very beginning, he stood by us through every step, making sure we always felt seen, heard, and appreciated. What could have been a scary and overwhelming experience was made so much easier because of his guidance, honesty, and compassion.

Jim didn’t just handle our case- he made Marc, who suffered an accident, feel secure and truly cared for. He never beat around the bush, always gave us clear and honest answers, and made sure Marc’s comfort came first. His professionalism is unmatched, but what sets Jim apart is his genuine heart.

By the end of this process, we don’t just feel like we had a great lawyer- we feel like we’ve gained a friend. We are beyond grateful for everything Jim has done and would recommend him without hesitation to anyone in need of not only an excellent attorney, but a truly remarkable person.

Jim Brennan and his team paralegal Jennifer Ignace listen and genuinely care about you. Providing practical and sound legal advice. Jim made a stressful and traumatic experience, easy for me to leave it with him.  With reassurance that he would see that I was fairly and rightly compensated for my injury. Jim seamlessly dealt with problematic situations that arose.  And adjusting course when my situation and intended result had an unexpected change. I am with gratitude of Jim and Jennifer’s professionalism, patience and efforts helping me with my case.  With years of experience, dedication, expertise, knowledge and commitment I put forward Jim Brennan Law.
Thank you

Jim Brennan helped me win my Worker's Comp case with his calm but confident demeanor.  His experience helped me wade through the medical chaos and legal confusions while struggling to deal with a life-altering injury. I would highly recommend his law firm.

I'm very happy Attorney Jim Brennan of Brennan Law Firm handled my personal injury case, with his years of experience and attention to every detail big or small and kindness I knew I was in the best possible hands, my case ended with a very comfortable settlement. I would highly recommend Jim Brennan to everyone.

Jim and his staff are not only great at what they do, but they truly car about their clients and it shows. Long after my settlement I needed some information about workman's comp. Jim did not hesitate to get back to me and help me out.

Great Law Firm!

In the Waterbury area and looking for a good representation, give Brennan Law Firm a call. Very timely and always in the best interest of the client.

My daughter and I were injured in a car accident. Attorney James Brennan, Stacy and the entire staff at the Brennan Law Firm, LLC represented us in our case against the reckless driver's insurance company. Attorney Brennan's expertise, persistence and diligence resulted in a settlement that we were VERY happy with. His kindness, patience, sound advise and steady communication throughout the process eased our stress and anxiety during a very difficult time. He was very aggressive with the insurance company and left no stone unturned in proving the negligence of the reckless driver and the extent of our injuries. Attorney Brennan is a masterful negotiator and an OUTSTANDING lawyer. I highly recommend Attorney James Brennan and the Brennan Law, Firm, LLC.

Attorney Brennan worked diligently for some time to try my case and all the hard worked was greatly appreciated because my case was a difficult one (too me).

Thanks Atty. Brennan & Stacy and the rest of the firm.

Randall L. Mason Sr.
I was in a car accident a ear ago and they were the law firm that I found. They helped me through the whole process and was very happy with the end result.
A close friend recommended me to Chorches office. He's pretty laid back, but very professional, handled my case quickly. Total livesaver! Thankyou!
Erandi is amazing. To us, he's more than a lawyer. He's more like an extended member of our family because of the help he gave us during our personal injury case

I CANT SAY ENOUGH ABOUT CUMMINGS LAW FIRM IN WATERBURY. ATTORNEY CUMMINGS DID MY DIVORCE 5 YEARS AGO AND BEING A MALE, I WAS WORRIED BECAUSE CONNECTICUT IS A WOMENS STATE. I FOUND ATTORNEY CUMMINGS TO BE COMPASSIONATE AND ALSO FIRM. HE DID A GREAT JOB AND I RECIEVED CUSTODY OF MY KIDS. JUST RECENTLY I HAD TO TAKE HER BACK FOR ANOTHER MATTER PERTAINIG TO THE DIVORCE. Kind, caring, professional!! Went above and beyond for me during my divorce! Highly recommend!!!

Was in the unfortunate position of needing a lawyer and I can’t say enough good things about Cummings Law Firm. Jim was able to see me the same day I called. My questions are always answered in a timely manner, usually within less than an hour or two. Jim and Marsha are both incredibly kind and professional. What really sealed it for me was Jim’s work with Eagle Scouts. If you are in need of an attorney who is professional and cares about you, pick up the phone and call Cummings Law Firm today!

Looking at loosing my house after using this firm, terrible advice, terrible at staying in contact, and after changing lawyers he still took his full cut of the weak settlement that was salvaged, if you’re reading this FIND ANOTHER FIRM !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
reviews.ownerResponse: I did not settle your case Bill.  You left my firm and went to Attorney Goff, who settled your case.  Not sure what you mean about "salvaging" your settlement as I was not involved in it, attorney Goff was.  You may want to leave this review for her as I have no idea what fee she charged you, but I did not get a full fee.  I haven't represented you in almost a year prior to your leaving for attorney Goff, which makes me wonder why you are leaving this negative review. Sorry to hear that things haven't worked out for you.  Best of luck in your future endeavors.

reviews.text: Attorney Cummings is a great individual with an exceptional and informative staff. I highly recommend their services. Thank you Cummings Law Firm!

I've been with Jim for 10 years for one reason. Trust. I know that he will do everything to improve my situation to achieve the best outcome. He's helped me through good and bad times and I can count on him no matter what the situation is .
The Algilani Law Firm was confident and professional. I trusted them to protect my interests and they exceeded all of my expectation.
Working with Dan i was able to see firsthand how hard he is willing to work for his clients. With his knowledge and gift of repartee, there are no matters too big or small that he cannot handle.

Dan was excellent in helping me to understand my options for pursuing legal action following an accident and also helped me to get the most for my claim. The entire ordeal was incredibly stressful, but it was invaluable to have had someone like Dan on my side supporting me throughout. Dan's experience was evident from the first time we spoke and made a huge difference in how my case played out. I cannot recommend Mr. Algilani enough.

Dan and his team are professional, responsive and they truly care about their clients.  If you have a personal injury claim, you will want attorney Dan to represent you.. you will not be disappointed!  Highly recommend them.
Daniel was very prompt, responsive and got me more money than I expected.  I would never use another firm.

As a fellow plaintiff's attorney who has worked closely with Attorney Dan Algilani for several years, I would highly recommend Dan as one of the area's top trial attorneys. Dan's willingness to reject low settlement offers in lieu of taking an insurer to trial places a premium on any case Dan's firm is counsel on, which translates to better offers. He's also a great guy!

-Attorney Mike Pellin

Dan Algilani is a very fast and efficient lawyer, the best I've ever had! Mr. Algilani has provided the up most respect and professionalism, I would hire him again in a heartbeat, I highly recommend him. Thank you.

Last attorney I retained was slow to respond and made it seem like I didn’t have a claim. I had a call with Dan immediately and he was able to dissect my case, push the insurance companies and get me paid when the other attorney said he couldn’t. Look no further!!  Thanks, Dan!

Dan did a great job helping me with my injury claim. I was able to heal up while he handled the insurance company and was great help in my time of need. I would recommended him to anyone struggling with their claim.

Dan is always easy to get in touch with.  If you don't get him on the phone (which is rare), he returns calls and emails quickly.  Having dealt with several attorneys, I can say Dan is among the best in responding to clients. I was impressed by his ability to keep pressure on the insurance company.  I would not hesitate to recommend him to anyone who was injured in a car crash, fall, or any other type of injury for that matter.
He is an excellent lawyer my husband used him for disability he explained all the steps was very encouraging and was a fighter when it came to hearing couldn’t have had a better lawyer

I scheduled an appointment with this office regarding my wife’s H-1B visa. Initially, I was informed that the earliest available appointment would be in three days. After those three days passed, I received a call stating that the attorney was sick and asking if I wanted to reschedule for another three days later. Assuming this was a one-time situation, I agreed.

When the new appointment day arrived, my wife and I both arranged our schedules and headed to their office for our 9:00 AM appointment. However, at 8:44 AM—when I was just two minutes away from their location—I received another call informing me that the attorney was sick again and the appointment would need to be rescheduled.

Considering that the H-1B filing window is extremely time-sensitive, this level of unreliability is very concerning. We lost valuable time and work hours due to these last-minute cancellations. If timing and professionalism are important for your case, this experience raises serious concerns about the reliability of this service.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Thank you for sharing your experience. We understand how important timing can be when immigration matters such as H-1B filings are involved.
During the time of your scheduled consultation, Attorney Anderson, who was expected to conduct the meeting, had to take unexpected emergency leave due to a sudden matter. Unfortunately, this situation developed quickly and we were not able to provide as much advance notice as we normally aim to give when adjustments to the schedule are required. We certainly wish we could have informed you sooner.

Because you were scheduled for an initial consultation and not yet a client of the firm, we understand that the experience may have been particularly frustrating after arranging your schedules and traveling toward the office. That was never our intention, and we appreciate you bringing the situation to our attention.

If you and your wife would still like to speak with someone at our office, we would be happy to waive the consultation fee and make every effort to schedule a time that works best for you.

You may contact our office at (203) 753-7300 if you wish to reschedule. We appreciate your understanding and wish you the best with your immigration matter.

reviews.text:
I had a terrible experience with an attorney I went to, prior to attorney Welcome. Let me just say this, from the moment I called until the moment the immigration interview was over, I had nothing but the best experience.
The paralegals who work in the office are so attentive, professional, and understanding.
James Welcome always made an effort to say hello, update, and sometimes personally answer phone calls when the other staff were helping others.
They put together, sent out, and updated our application/ process thoroughly and in a timely fashion.
Attorney Marina Brakefield had to accompany us to the interview since James was unavailable that day. She is so knowledgeable and well experienced that I had no hesitations. She made us feel ready, calm, and confident throughout the entire process.

I whole heartedly recommend either attorney to help you if you are in need. You can count on them as well as their well experienced and professional staff to make sure you are up to date with any information. They will go above and beyond to answer your questions and make themselves available every time.

Thank you to the entire team.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Thank you for taking the time to share such a detailed and meaningful review. We are truly grateful that you trusted our firm after a difficult prior experience, and we’re honored to have supported you from the first call through the completion of your immigration interview.

Your kind words about our paralegals, Attorney Marina Brakefield, and Attorney James A. Welcome mean a great deal to our entire team. We take pride in being attentive, responsive, and thorough at every stage of the process, and it’s rewarding to hear that you felt informed, prepared, and confident throughout.

We understand how personal and stressful immigration matters can be, and our goal is always to make sure our clients feel supported, respected, and cared for every step of the way. Thank you again for your trust and recommendation. We wish you and your family all the best, and we are always here if you need us in the future.

reviews.text:
It’s been surprisingly difficult to find a good immigration lawyer. My husband has a complicated case, and after a very bad experience with our previous lawyer, we decided to switch. This time we wanted to choose carefully, so we took our time researching—websites, reviews, and social media of immigration lawyers in CT. Since you usually can’t speak with them without paying for a consultation, we narrowed it down to the top four we found and pay for a consult: three in CT and one in NY. Attorney James Welcome seems the best option for our case. He replied to my email immediately, called me, and asked questions to make sure they could actually help us even before charging for a consultation—something very rare. The consultation itself was clear, to the point, and he explained both pros and cons. He was patient, kind, and exactly what we were looking for.

Other consultations were disappointing—some lawyers rushed through, quoting prices before even giving answers; one called 15 minutes late and hadn’t even read our case, only repeating what the documents already said.

I know how hard it is to find someone who doesn’t just take your money, but actually take your case seriosly and fix the problem. That’s why I’ll update this review in a few months. For now, I truly believe this firm is the best option for anyone needing immigration help.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Thank you so much for sharing your experience. We understand how difficult and stressful it can be to place your trust in an attorney after having a negative experience, especially when your family’s future is at stake. That’s why we make it a priority to listen first, ask the right questions, and give you honest answers before moving forward.

Attorney James Welcome and our entire team truly care about helping families feel supported and informed throughout their case. We’re glad you felt heard and respected, and we’ll continue to work hard to earn your trust in the months ahead.

Please know that you’re not alone—we’ll be with you at every step of this process, providing clear guidance and dedicated support. We look forward to updating your journey with you.
Thank you for the 5-star review! We're so grateful for your support and thrilled to know you had a great experience with our team. If you ever need anything in the future, we’re always here to help.

I cannot speak highly enough of Martin Minnella and the unparalleled skill he demonstrated in handling my case. To provide some context, I was facing my fourth drug charge with a record spanning over 30 years, including past convictions for drug sales and a violation of the CORA act. I was arrested with 180 grams of cocaine and was initially offered a plea deal of 10 years, suspended after 5 to serve with 5 years probation, it was an “Accept or Reject” offer which means "take it or leave it" and go to trial. If I go to trial, I would face the terrifying possibility of a 30-year sentence. Both the prosecution and the judge were unyielding.
That’s when Martin Minnella entered the picture—a seasoned and legendary attorney, known for being the only lawyer in the U.S. to have beaten five murder charges in a row. I have heard the name Martin Minnella throughout my life  and that he was one of the best if not the best. I entrusted my case to Marty, and it was the best decision I could have made. On the day of sentencing, I arrived prepared for the worst, wearing black sneakers, a grey sweatsuit, three pairs of socks, and three pairs of boxers, fully expecting to be taken into custody.
But what happened next was nothing short of remarkable. Against all odds, Martin Minnella achieved what seemed impossible: he secured a deal of 10 years suspended with no time to serve and a $5,000 fine. To say this outcome was incredible is an understatement.
Martin Minnella is an absolute force to be reckoned with in the courtroom. His knowledge, strategy, and unwavering commitment to his clients are unmatched. I don’t know of any other attorney who could have delivered the same results. If you need an attorney who will fight tooth and nail for you, Marty is the one to call.
Thank you, Marty, for your extraordinary work. I would recommend him and I do to everyone without hesitation. He truly changes lives!
John was great attorney.

reviews.ownerResponse: Larissa, WOW thank you for your amazing 5 star review! All of us at Tindall Law Firm, LLC are glad to have another happy and satisfied client. It is so crucial to keep our clients informed on all that is going on with there case and to explain it in non-legalise language. This helps ease client anxiety and helps them understand the process, which sometimes can seem confounding to one who has never been through this like we have. Having now handled cases like this for nearly 30 years, I try to use my vast experience to think if I was the client how would I like to be treated  and what kind of questions or concerns would I have. reviews.text:
From start to finish, Tavis and his team treated me with genuine care, professionalism, and transparency. Even at the very end of the process—when I was expecting things to be just routine—they went above and beyond to make me feel like family. Tavis kept me informed every step of the way, resolved complications without hesitation, and ensured I was never left in the dark.

It’s rare to work with a firm where you feel like more than just a case file. Tindall Law Firm delivered excellent results, but what stood out most was the way they handled everything—with heart, integrity, and humanity. I highly recommend them to anyone needing legal representation.

Thank you again, Tavis and the team. You helped bring closure to a very difficult chapter in my life, and I’m forever grateful.

reviews.text:
I was involved in my first car accident in 2021 and was immediately referred to Jonathan. He has made the entire process and situation less stressful. extremely easy.

Jonathan is passionate and genuinely cares about his clients— your overall condition, the case—-he consistently shows it. He made sure to include me on each decision, and was truthful about what the potential implications of certain decisions. That’s one of the greatest things. I, as the client, made the decisions. Many lawyers will force a client to make decisions or do something that they’re not 100% comfortable with. Jonathan did not pressure or force me in any way, but instead provided honest legal counsel so that I can make a well informed decision. He always said “Lydia, I’m you’re attorney, but this is your decision. You tell me how you want to move forward.”

He was very patient, concise, and detailed when answering my questions (I had plenty) and providing updates on the case. His work ethic is very high and it’s proven with by his consistency. There was never a moment over the last almost 1.5 years, that I was unaware of the status of the case or needed to question if I was being represented correctly.

If it weren’t for Jonathan, I wouldn’t have had such a positive experience and outcome to my case. He will truly fight for you and is not focused on personal gain. He will do what is in your best interest, makes sure the truth is known, and justice is served.
reviews.ownerResponse: Lydia, thank you so much for this great and kind review. I very much appreciate you taking the time to write it and am proud for having represented you.

I am in healthcare and have the pleasure of regularly working with Attorney Julia Brown to meet client needs for elder law long term planning matters.  She puts the needs of her client and their family above others.  I personally have used Attorney Brown in family matters with good results and recommend her to others.

The process of applying and qualifying for Medicaid (Title-19) was quite challenging and way more complicated than we imagined for my parents. There were different options and approaches to managing my parents estate to qualify for Medicaid and Julia spent as much time as we needed to explain the options/approaches in meetings. She initially drew out the options on a whiteboard - this was our game plan. We had multiple conference calls and in-person meetings with Julia and her excellent assistant Dana through the entire process - which took many months. The amount of time and paperwork handled/managed by Julia and Dana was quite literally a mountain. We could not have navigated the path to Medicaid for my parents without the excellent guidance and support of Julia M Brown. Julia and Dana continue to help and promptly answer questions we might have even though we completed the process that we hired her for. No, it is not cheap to hire professional legal services such as what Julia Brown provides, but what her office provided was well worth it to us.
Both Julia and Dana are very professional and responsive. Highly recommend!

My husband and I had Julia Brown  take care of our wills. Doing a will is a very emotional experience. Julia and Dana (her legal assistant) took the time to answer our many, many questions and were very patient and compassionate in helping us make difficult decisions. There is so much to think about, that it's important to have a professional take care of it and Julia was the perfect attorney for the job. I would highly recommend going to her for your wills or estate planning.

Julia Brown, Esq. and her very able assistant, Dana Esposito are the best team possible for dealing with your elder law issues. This exceptional team shepherded us through the Title XIX process for our mom. Having done this on our own for our aunt, it is an understatement to say that it is a complicated process, fraught with many pitfalls. Julia and Dana took our raw data, organized it, and presented it to state officials in such a professional manner that it sailed right through in record time. We now plan to work with this team on our own estate planning issues so that we can face the future with confidence.  We recommend the law office of Julia Brown without reservation.

Attorney Julia Brown has helped many of my friends, family and clients. She is extremely knowledgeable and  well versed in estate planning. I highly recommend  Attorney Julia  Brown for anyone that wants to be prepared for their future.

Julia Brown is an excellent attorney, very thorough and professional.  She has helped me with numerous legal situations, ie elder law, probate, setting up S-Corporations and a will.  I have known and trusted her for over 20 years and would highly recommend her.
Julia has done much work for me and has always done so with professional and caring services! I highly recommend!

DO NOT go to julia brown!  she legally takes a lot of your money and does almost nothing for you. when my family member went to her all she did was a power of attorney  and  filled out the paperwork for title 19. NEVER did she tell us we had to do so much  to get title 19,she kept saying she would get my family member on it! again she did nothing!!! we gave her 5000 and got nothing for it! i found other people who said the same thing. when another member of my family needed a lawyer i found one who did power of attorney, changing of a will, DNR forms and started title 19 forms for 250 dollars! PLEASE look around for attorneys, again  julia brown legally takes your money and does NOTHING for you!!!

Julia is a very caring person. She and her staff, Dana, are knowledgeable about elder law and the current tax laws.
I would highly recommend this office for anyone needing great advice and care.

I am so happy I chose Dressler Law to represent me. From start to finish, everyone was incredibly professional, caring, and committed to my case. Jessica Retamar, the initial paralegal who helped me in the beginning, was patient, attentive, and made sure I understood every step. Later, Maritza Ferrer, the litigation paralegal, continued that same level of dedication and support.

Attorney Tavi Dressler did a phenomenal job fighting for my case and ultimately secured a great settlement for me. I never once felt forgotten or confused the communication was always clear, consistent, and accessible. The entire team spoke Spanish, which made the process even more comfortable.

I would absolutely recommend Dressler Law to anyone in need of legal representation, and I will continue to use them in the future. Truly an outstanding firm!

reviews.text:
Ron and Lou will fight for you! This headline couldn’t be more accurate. Ron has been diligently working with the rest of the firm on my case since 2023. Every month, Ron or his paralegal calls without fail, checking in or briefing me on any updates. They have maintained consistency throughout the case, following up and following through. I have been kept informed about every decision made throughout this process.

When I was involved in the accident, I was worried and felt alone after how I was treated by the other party and the police department. In search of a reputable firm, I found Etemi Law. I was impressed by the numerous 5-star reviews they had received within the prior six months to a year, highlighting their exceptional services.

At about 9:30 p.m, I reached out to the firm. Not expecting a call back, Lou Etemi immediately returned my call. The next morning, I was called by Ron, who asked if he could take my case.

To help my case, Ron went above and beyond. For example, he went on a Saturday morning to find the witness who had footage of the car accident, which corroborated my testimony to the police. The police saw this footage when the witness came forward, but they left it out of their report. Ron diligently gathered all the necessary information to support my case.

Ron’s support has been unwavering. Ron’s aggressive and relentless approach in court has been instrumental in fighting my case.

But this is who Ron and Lou truly are. They go above and beyond to exceed your expectations. If you’re looking for an honest firm that puts the client above all, call Etemi Law!

Ron and Lou will fight for you! This headline couldn’t be more accurate. Ron has been diligently working with the rest of the firm on my case since 2023. Every month, Ron or his paralegal calls without fail, checking in or briefing me on any updates. They have maintained consistency throughout the case, following up and following through. I have been kept informed about every decision made throughout this process.

When I was involved in the accident, I was worried and felt alone after how I was treated by the other party and the police department. In search of a reputable firm, I found Etemi Law. I was impressed by the numerous 5-star reviews they had received within the prior six months to a year, highlighting their exceptional services.

At about 9:30 p.m, I reached out to the firm. Not expecting a call back, Lou Etemi immediately returned my call. The next morning, I was called by Ron, who asked if he could take my case.

To help my case, Ron went above and beyond. For example, he went on a Saturday morning to find the witness who had footage of the car accident, which corroborated my testimony to the police. The police saw this footage when the witness came forward, but they left it out of their report. Ron diligently gathered all the necessary information to support my case.

Ron’s support has been unwavering. Ron’s aggressive and relentless approach in court has been instrumental in fighting my case.

But this is who Ron and Lou truly are. They go above and beyond to exceed your expectations. If you’re looking for an honest firm that puts the client above all, call Etemi Law!

He got away with paying scraps for child support and less time with his son. When it came time for him to move out of state, I came to Kinga for help. From day one she was all ears. She worked with me relentlessly making sure that my son's father and I could come to reasonable terms and agreements for support and visitation. She consistently made me think of the welfare of my child and helped me make rational choices during the agreements. She knew how bad my anxiety is so she had me sit in the hall away from the meeting and spoke all on my behalf. I barely said a word in the courtroom. Her retainer and fees are beyond reasonable and she was patient with my payments. Thanks to Kinga, my ex and I are okay and my son is taken care of.

reviews.text: Bartlett & Grippe exceeded my best expectations. I was getting no response from the insurance company on the promise to cover my medical bills after a car accident, and at the point of utter frustration, I decided to reach out to Frank Bartlett to see if working with him could help. I knew I didn't want a lawyer from a billboard -- I had plenty to handle and wasn't interested in a slick sales approach or being juggled by entry-level staff --  and was very impressed with the professionalism, knowledge, and approachability of Frank and everyone I dealt with at Bartlett & Gripe. They were great to work with and delivered a payment that exceeded my highest expectations. I recommend them without hesitation.

As a male survivor, navigating this process has been incredibly challenging. When I first reached out to Frank Bartlett at Bartlett & Grippe, it was on a random day at a random time, yet he stopped everything to truly listen to me. Despite the complexity of my situation, he was willing to help and advised me to call again if I couldn’t find proper representation.

When I did call back, Frank personally guided me, not only helping me with the Office of the Victim Advocate but also speaking up for my rights as a victim. Unfortunately, I later chose to move forward with another law firm—only to discover they were lazy, unmotivated, and clearly did not have my best interests at heart the way Frank Bartlett did.

After realizing my mistake, I reached back out to Frank, and he responded in under 30 minutes with exactly what I needed. That speaks volumes about his professionalism and genuine care for clients.

Without a doubt, I would return to Mr. Bartlett and fully trust him and his firm to handle my case with the dedication and integrity they’ve already shown me.

Thank you, Mr. Bartlett, for everything you’ve done.
Jason assisted me with a case. The process was very smooth. He explained everything in detail and was very responsive to any questions or concerns I had.
It was wonderful working with Jason Gambsy. He was professional and always kept me up to date with the case. Thank you Jason and I’ll definitely recommend you to family and friends.

Seeking legal counsel was a daunting task for me when I had my accident - not knowing who to call for help. After performing my research on various law firms, I contacted Bartlett & Grippe explaining my situation. This firm chose to accept my (what I considered to be) a small case for a serious foot injury.

I worked with both Frank and Joe who not only empathized with my situation, but thought that helping me was more important than the money they would receive from my case. Joe's quick response to filing motions on my behalf was gratifying for me and was very prompt and thorough in all his explanations to the court.

After a few years, Joe was able to present an offer just before the trial proceedings and the other party settled which satisfied both parties. The settlement offer was considered "very good" for my type of case/injury and I never thought I would have received the representation from a better law firm - not only are their knowledge of the law which is to be commended, but their many years of experience dealing with cases such as mine and the care they showed can't be expressed enough.

I truly am thankful for Frank and Joe's efforts and would recommend them without hesitation!

reviews.text:
Having grown up with Ioannis and his family, I can attest to Attorney Kaloidis’s strong character and integrity. He is a devoted family man who demonstrates deep respect and love for his immediate family, particularly his mother, late father, and grandparents. He consistently treats others with dignity, values people from all walks of life, and is always willing to listen or offer assistance when needed.
Attorney Kaloidis has a strong commitment to justice and shows genuine compassion for victims and survivors of domestic violence and sexual assault. He is a dedicated advocate who works tirelessly to represent his clients and pursue fair and just outcomes. I highly recommend contacting his law firm for legal advice or representation.
I am also passionate about minimizing abuse through education and increasing community awareness of what abuse entails, as well as highlighting the resources available to help and protect all victims and survivors. It is important to understand that abuse can involve internal trauma stemming from a current relationship—often involving someone close, someone deeply cared for—where emotional bonds make it difficult to escape.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you. Words like these remind me why this work matters. Your passion for protecting survivors and raising awareness is important work — Thank you!

My name is Anthony & want to let everyone to know that Phil is truly the real deal. From start to finish, he handled my case with professionalism, honesty, and real efficiency. He secured a victory for me in the five figures, and the outcome means more than he probably realizes.

What really separates Phil is the way he does business. I have worked with bigger offices before, and honestly, size does not define impact. The way you handle people does. With Phil, nothing felt automated, nothing felt corporate, and there was no red tape. Most importantly, there was no slickness, no weird energy, no confusion, nothing out of place. Just straight, solid business handled the right way.

He treats you like a person first, not just another case number. Professional enough that you know everything is being taken care of correctly, but human enough that you feel respected and understood throughout the entire process. That balance is rare.

reviews.text:
In 2022, my life changed in a matter of seconds. I was mauled and dragged by a dog that trespassed onto my property and attacked me and my two dogs. I was in complete shock. I didn’t know what to do, who to call, or how to even process what had just happened. I felt terrified, cornered, and completely alone.

When I started reaching out to lawyers, most didn’t truly listen. Some rushed the conversation, some minimized what happened, and some just didn’t seem to understand the trauma of being attacked in your own home. Then I spoke with Stacy. She understood immediately — not just the legal side, but the shock, fear, and emotional aftermath. That moment mattered more than I can put into words.

From that point forward, Tom Pettinichi, Stacy Crochet, and Sam were there for me in a way I will never forget. From 2022 on, they walked with me through every doctor visit, every appointment, every setback, and every hard day. When I felt broken, overwhelmed, or completely alone, they did not disappear. They showed up.

My case was complex. My injuries were not simple or “textbook.” I suffered lasting physical injuries, PTSD, and the devastating loss of my dog. Despite the emotional weight of this case and how long it took, they never gave up on me. They did not push me into a quick settlement just to move on. They fought — for every dollar, every detail, and every moment of accountability.

I truly believe most attorneys would have walked away from my case or settled at the first offer. Tom and his team did the opposite. They prepared my case as if it were going to trial, leaving no holes, no shortcuts, and no excuses.

For four and a half years, they kept me informed, supported, and treated me like a human being — not just a case file. When I felt like there was no hope left for me, they reminded me that I had rights, that what happened to me mattered, and that I deserved justice.

I will forever be grateful to Tom Pettinichi, Stacy Crochet, and Sam. If you are suffering after a personal injury — especially if you are traumatized, grieving, or feel like no one is listening — this is the team that will stand with you when you need it most.
reviews.ownerResponse: From day one, our goal was to make sure you felt heard, supported, and protected — not just legally, but as a person. We are grateful we could help you pursue the accountability and justice you deserved. Wishing you continued healing and peace.

reviews.text: Attorney Pettinicchi and paralegal Stacy were wonderful to work with. I had a complex and severe multiple-dog attack case. It took over 3 years to get to resolution, but we did! From Day 1 when Stacy came to my house to take photos and interview me, through multiple preparations with Attorney Pettinicchi, they were amazing. Attorney Pettinicchi knew how to explain things in a way that a lay person could understand. They even conducted a focus group at their law firm as the case had some unique characteristics. They went above and beyond. Let's hope you never need a personal injury attorney, but if you do...use this firm!

From the moment we met them, to the moment we signed off on our last set of bill payments, they made the entire process extremely easy and very simple to understand. They take care of absolutely everything for you, collection of all information about the case, records, bills etc. All while making sure that you are being taken care of, your well being is genuinely their utmost concern, unfortunately you don't see that very often with other law firms, but with them, we never felt not taken care of or unheard. They went above and beyond for my family and I. Kimberly was a constant point of contact, she is extremely kind, efficient and made me feel like a genuine friend. It is reassuring to know Attorney Weber's team, at Weber, Carrier, Boiczyk & Chase, is there for us should we need them again.  We would certainly look for their help again should we need to do so.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for your kind words, Robert! We are so glad that we were able to assist you and your wife with your claim. We strive to ensure that our clients understand the entire process and are satisfied with the outcome. We are always here for you should you need our help again in the future. Thank you for choosing us!

reviews.text: After talking to no less than six law firms, all of which were highly rated, I decided on Weber and Carrier, LLP.  I met with Bob Weber, a very professional and highly competent attorney at that firm who really impressed me, and with whom I ultimately chose to represent my interests in a significant personal injury claim.  Bob Weber really delivered!  He accepted my case and worked diligently to document and build my position against a National company that hired an elite law firm with an international presence.  Let me just say, Bob did an outstanding job and worked tirelessly to counter their defenses and obtain a settlement that I originally thought was impossible. I know the old saying – “every case is different” but whatever your case is – this is the guy to call.  Thank you Bob and for all my future legal needs, you will be my first and only call!
reviews.ownerResponse:

reviews.text: Loyal, Caring, Will Go The EXTRA MILE!

If you are looking for a lawyer DO NOT COME HERE , my step dad got a dui even tho he wasn’t the one driving . He hired them so they can represent them and go in his place instead of him going to court . The lawyer then proceeded to tell him that he had to come with him , when they got there the lawyer told him to sit down and wait for him , just for my step dad to sit down and wait for him to come out since he was the one who actually went in court. He made my step dad go to court when he didn’t have to bc that’s why he hired them . Then the lawyer proceeded to ask my step dad for a cigarette and my step dad went to his car to get him one , once he was about to turn around ICE was behind him , and you know what the lawyer did to help him NOTHINGGG . My step dads brother then proceeded to call the lawyer and the lawyer told him that my step dad didn’t pay him and that he needed to get payed , so the brother called my step dad and told him what was happening, and my step dad told him that he DID pay . The brother then called the lawyer and told him that HE DID INFACT pay , and then he basically said how he didn’t say that and stuff . The lawyer set my step dad up to get deported. PLEASE DO NOT COME HERE FOR HELP , THEY WILL NOT HELP YOU
reviews.ownerResponse:
This client was arrested by ICE for being undocumented and having a DUI with priors. He was obligated to come to court or there would have been another order issued for his arrest. I received a new court date so we could make plans for the next court appearance. I was escorting him to his car and he bagan to talk to me about another legal problem he had. When we arrived at his car we were detained by at least 3 ICE agents. He gave me the keys to his car and I was able to return his car to his family. I NEVER asked for more money or even mentioned money instead I spoke to his wife and brother on the phone. I asked them to provide me with his “A” number so that we can track his progress through the court system. I learned that he was taken to Massachusetts were he would be held for a bond hearing. I explained to his wife and brother that because of the legal charges he had on file and another legal matter that he was worried could be made against him he would not be given a bond and would be deported to his home country.

I have picked up every phone call he has made to me from detention, I appeared for him at his next court appearance even though he was still in detention. I asked the State’s attorney to drop the case due to the circumstances but they refused and issued a bench warrant instead.

reviews.text: Bad service
did a great job
Attorney Maffeo did an amazing job with a complicated divorce. He has relationships with everyone in the court which made things run smoothly. I highly recommend him.
Very helpful and eased my stress. He answered my questions in a timely manner. I highly recommend him as he’s very knowledgeable at his line of work. Very professional.

I’m incredibly grateful for Attorney Maffeo’s support during my divorce. From start to finish, he showed that he genuinely cared about my situation and was fully committed to helping me reach a fair and positive outcome. His professionalism and persistence made a meaningful difference, and I’m deeply appreciative of the positive change he helped bring about in my life.

I cannot recommend Attorney Maffeo highly enough.  From the very beginning of my divorce process he demonstrated an exceptional level of professionalism, experience and compassion.  He was thorough, honest and provided all of the details and options.  It was immediately clear that I was in the hands of someone who not only knew the law inside and out but who also truly cared about achieving the best possible outcome for me and my children.  The judge even stated so at our first court hearing!  Attorney Maffeo's honesty and integrity stood out the most.  He was always straightforward even when the truth was difficult to hear, and that transparency built the trust necessary to make it through such a challenging time.  There was clear communication, dependable guidance and great efficiency.  My case was handled swiftly and I never felt like it was dragged on or necessarily delayed.  I wholeheartedly recommend Attorney Justin Maffeo - he respected my time and my circumstances, and I am deeply grateful for the support and advocacy that I received from him and his office.

I hired Justin to tackle what ended up being a long, drawn out divorce process (by no fault of his own!) and couldn't imagine under any circumstances that it would end in the manner by which it did. Separating from an extremely hostile and dangerous narcissist while raising my first child, then barely a year old, was frightening to plan out, let alone undertake, but Attorney Maffeo ended up being a godsend, both in a legal and interpersonal sense. Shortly after our first consultation, my toddler disappeared for nearly a month after my ex disappeared with my car, phone, and our son. Needless to say, I was constantly on edge, miles beyond anxious, and fully sleep-deprived. My divorce was unspeakably messy and chaotic, but had it not been for Justin's calm and collected nature, I would've lost my mind. He was a constant bulwark against my emotional spillover, always giving me a full spate of options and highlighting what he saw as the wisest move to make while still never pressuring me to go in one direction or another. The decisions were always mine to make, though I owe Justin a debt of gratitude for enduring my strong opinions and stronger personality...I'm deeply passionate about my little guy and was driven more by gut than legal sense at times, which I admit led to an outburst or three along the way in moments where the "long game" was unclear to me. Thankfully, there was never a moment where Justin took it personally. In meetings where a rational person would've booted me out of their office due to my at-times argumentative nature, he was perpetually mindful of my underlying pain and uncertainty, in conjunction with associated moods that would naturally arise given wider circumstances.  In short, this man is a consummate professional and absolute workhorse. While I'm not recommending that anyone adapt my style of communication, Justin was EXTREMELY responsive regardless of whether they were days, nights, weekends, and holidays. Please be a decent human being and reach out at normal hours, as my particular situation seemed to evolve by the hour, but I have to give credit where credit is due. I gave this poor bastard a literal mountain's worth of documentation, and he dutifully combed through each and every word like a detective. One of the wisest pieces of advice he ever gave me, and I'll paraphrase, is that "when you're winning, embrace the silence". That carried me far, through both the trial and all that's occurred since. Justin may be part machine, but he's also human. The guy has a sharp sense of humor and is very approachable, and I've never felt uncomfortable, intimidated or disrespected in his presence. As statistically unlikely as this was as an outcome, I was ultimately granted sole custody of my son in a state where the odds of such are on par with correctly guessing the number of jellybeans in a jar at the state fair. Not to sound like a billboard come to life, but Justin is a zealous advocate for his clientele. I say that because looking back, I consider myself to have been at the extreme polarity of a generic divorce situations. If he can handle my circumstances with the grace and dignity that he did, then no one should expect anything less for themselves if they were to choose his representation for their own matter. I don't want this to be lost in the mix, but in addition to our navigation of civil court, my ex was also facing criminal charges as well for domestic assault and endangering the welfare of a child. For a very reasonable cost, he tackled both cases side by side. Justin is tireless both in and out of the courtroom, and was absolutely brilliant on his feet during the various hearings we had over the course of my process. He ensured that I was well-prepared for testimony, and was excellent at periodically checking in with me. Not all days during a divorce are rosy, and knowing such, Justin kept my emotions in check and expectations clear. He single handedly gave me my life back - give him a chance!!

I’ve worked with Attorney Maffeo on two separate occasions. Very favorable outcomes on both occasions. Attorney Maffeo was extremely responsive and professional. His knowledge of the law is evident. I would 100 percent recommend him if you are in need of an attorney. Thanks again Attorney Maffeo!
He is exceptional, He is great at what he does. He is very professional and passionate. I was prepared because he informed me, it was going to be a bumpy ride. I felt very comfortable. He is amazing.

I wholeheartedly endorse Attorney Brayton to anyone in search of a legal professional who combines unparalleled knowledge with unimpeachable integrity and a steadfast dedication to achieving the best possible results for their clients. reviews.text: My family and I recommend Attorneys Biller and Robert without reservation. Our home was gutted by fire, and we could not find representation. No one wanted to sue an insurance agent for negligence, but Jon and Brianna believed in the merits of our case.  Their knowledge,  experience, and outside experts laid the foundation for our success.  While the case took almost three years to resolve, their patience, diligence, and determination resulted in a settlement that allowed us to move forward with our lives. Knowing that they were fighting for us, when no one else believed in our case, gave us tremendous comfort during a devastating time.  If you have been told you don’t have a case, as we were, I urge you to meet with this firm. You will not be disappointed. They are my family’s firm for life!

We cannot say enough good things about Biller, Sachs & Robert. From start to finish, they were incredibly professional, sharp, and deeply committed to protecting our interests. They handled a very complex and high stakes matter with precision, confidence, and compassion. They always keeping us informed and making sure we understood every step of the process.

Their attention to detail, strategic thinking, and responsiveness gave us total peace of mind during what could have been an overwhelming situation. It was clear they genuinely cared about achieving the best possible outcome, not just closing a case.

If you’re looking for a law firm that is intelligent, ethical, thorough, and truly on your side, this is the team you want. We are beyond grateful for their work and highly recommend them.

After a Long year of fighting with Insurance company for Semi Trucks Fire incident claim and getting nowhere thank goodness I was referred to Biller, Sachs & Robert  by my first attorney, within days after  speaking with Niki Abossedgh she got Down to business and soon after  Insurance company started to negotiate after they have been ignoring my first attorney for a whole year , Niki got Insurance company to pay for my Total  Equipments loss , very expensive cleaning  and storage costs, because of Niki hard work, professionalism and hands on I’m finally getting back to work,THANK YOU
Will definitely recommend this Law Firm for anyone who want’s results and they will be my first to call if I ever need an Attorney.

Brianna, Jon, and the entire team at Biller, Sachs & Robert were truly outstanding to work with. From day one, they were incredibly attentive—responding to calls and emails promptly, making us feel heard, and offering steady support through what was otherwise an overwhelming experience.

They took the time to listen carefully, understand our concerns, and walk us through each step of the process with clarity and compassion. We asked a lot of questions, and they never once made us feel like we were overstepping. Their patience, expertise, and even sense of humor made a difficult situation feel far more manageable.

We’re deeply grateful for their guidance and professionalism. While we hope never to need their services again (!), we wouldn't hesitate to work with them if we ever do.

In our effort to settle a very difficult corporate insurance claim, we were referred to Biller, Sachs and Robert. We can unequivocally state that without their vast knowledge of insurance law, utmost professionalism, guidance and enduring patience, we would not have achieved a favorable outcome.
We presented them with a very complex situation including multiple parties, multiple insurance companies and their exclusions and competing interest. They were prompt to respond, very patient with our numerous questions, and dedicated to keeping us informed, as the long process played out.
We highly recommend Biller, Sachs and Robert without reservations.

J&B

Jon and his team, Scott and Darlene, to name a few, were fantastic to deal with. Clearly outlining the entire process. Communicating constantly with updates and discussions to ensure I was totally aware of the status of my situation. I would highly recommend this firm to handle whatever legal issues you may have to deal with.

It is with tremendous gratitude I am giving a 5-star rating to Biller, Sachs, Robert & DeLaura. After being left in a devastating situation with our former management company’s lack of knowledge, as a HOA Board, we put our trust into Biller, Sachs, Robert & DeLaura. They are responsive, professionally managed, such a pleasant team to work with and most importantly, proactive. The knowledge is vast and readily available. We worked closely with Jon and Brianna and were impressed, and of course, incredibly pleased with our outcome. I would highly recommend the services.

To the entire team, thank you so much for all you do to keep things in order and always moving forward!

I am truly grateful for having Attorney Biller and his team represent me.
They are professional, diligent and knowledgeable.
They worked tirelessly to lay out and substantiate the facts of the matter (a very difficult case) settling without the need for trial.
I truly believe that they were able and succeeded to reach an agreement where both parties left satisfied.
Our side, certainly more than the defendants.
I would strongly recommend anyone in need of representation to reach out to Biller, Sachs & Robert.
Attorney Robert was wonderful to work with.  Thoughtful, detail oriented, smart, and compassionate.  I would highly recommend her to anyone looking for representation.

From our first meeting with Attorney Jon Biller and Attorney Brianna Robert it was apparent that this firm had the expertise needed to assist us in our property damage claim. It was so reassuring to have them take on the issues, guide us through the process unfamiliar to us, while dealing with multiple defendants and always keeping us informed. Brianna Robert was impressive with her ability to communicate the facts of our case but also bring the human side of it to the forefront. We would highly recommend Biller Sachs & Robert.

Mr. Biller and Ms. Robert were consistantly helpful and knowledgeable in their pursuit of a settlement in our case.  We were kept in contact with the whole process and were satisfied with the results.  We had no experience with such matters, and were always notified of the progress and kept comfortable with our responsibilities in our case.  I would recommend this firm to anyone requiring knowledgeable advice in legal claims situations.

I'm very happy with my experience with Biller, Sachs & Robert, they and everyone else on the team were very helpful every step of the way. They worked very hard on my case which was unique and somewhat difficult and in the end everything worked out great. I would definitely recommend them to anyone seeking help. I lost a lot when my house was destroyed by my neighbors pool and I  was denied by my insurance company as well as my neighbors insurance but Jon and Brianna  fought for me and won a settlement. I am very grateful for everything they did for me. I'll be sure to go to them again in the future if I need help with anything else.

I can’t thank Jon, Brianna and the rest of the Biller, Sachs & Robert team enough. Jon and his team were very professional, easy to understand and extremely thorough. I found both Jon and Brianna to be straight forward and to the point.

We had a botched construction job at our home. The installer and manufacturer both denied responsibility and made a “good will offer“ of a very small dollar amount which was completely unreasonable. The short of it is Jon was able to prove liability on the installers part and won us more than 15 times the initial offer.    I hope I never need Jon’s assistance again but if I do I feel confident with him on my side!!!!

Jon Biller and his firm were a lifeline to us after 15 months of unsuccessful negotiations on a property damage claim that was going nowhere. We had spent $$$$ and countless hours b/w our team of legal counsel, private adjuster, contractor in negotiation with the insurance adjuster and were emotionally traumatized and exhausted without making any progress. We decided to start fresh with a new team which brought us to Attorney Biller. We found him par excellent, accessible, objective, just, articulate, ethical and above all someone who can get the job done effectively and in a timely manner. His colleague Attorney Brianna Robert was excellent and office staff particularly Dee and Anne were always professional, competent and a comfort to speak with. Our claim was settled for 3 times the original settlement proposed by the insurance adjuster. Above all Attorney Biller’s taking over our case allowed us peace of mind, gave us back our self-respect and allowed us to carry on with our very busy lives knowing that we were in excellent hands. We are very thankful and would recommend Attorney Biller and his team wholeheartedly!

After an unfortunate accident, I turned to “Biller, Sachs, and Robert”. What I most admire about the firm is the professionalism, work ethic,  and perseverance of leaving no stone. unturned. They kept me informed and guided me through this stressful case. I am so grateful for all your hard work to ensure success.  What an amazing team!

From our first interaction, it became quite evident that the attorneys at Biller, Sachs & Robert possessed a high degree of expertise in the field of insurance claims.  Despite feeling a little like David going up against Goliath, our dispute with a bohemuth insurance company was handled professionally and the matter was resolved to the satisfaction of all parties.  They stayed the course with us for over three years taking our case all the way to the Connecticut Supreme Court.  We highly recommend the team at BS&R.

Our insurance company initially denied our claim. Attorney Cileena Y. Terra come to our rescue. She brought relatively fast resolution to our case and acted as our advocate.  Without her, our house will still me in shambles. Thank you!

After my MVA I used Biller, Sachs,  and Robert for my attorneys. Everyone there was always kind and made sure to always check in on me with how I was feeling and with any updates of my case. They are all very knowledgeable and proactive with their tasks. Very recommended and will be my first choice if I ever need a lawyer again! Thank you to the entire team for going to bat for me and helping me out. Uou are all amazing!

I had a complicated real estate insurance issue to resolve and Attorney Biller and his team worked with us for 2 1/2 years to successfully resolve it.
I was impressed by this firms effectiveness and reliable responsiveness.
I would highly recommend them to anyone who needs legal assistance.

I am extremely pleased with this firm. I was in a car accident, other person's fault. Atty Biller and his team were attentive, professional, results driven but with compassion, understanding and support. They took care of everything and kept me updated throughout the entire process. They worked hard to get a settlement that justified the damages and injuries. I always felt they were on top of things, and became aware that they are very well respected and have a great success rate.

I was involved in a car accident with my new born son & wife. I was directed to seek legal representation from a friend. I spoke with Attorney Biller and he assured me they would take care of us. They definitely did. Brianna & Cileena handled my case with the upmost professionalism. They truly made every step of the process seamless. They went above and beyond to make sure my family & I got the best return & care  we deserved. Always very clear and consistent communication. A truly unfortunate situation became much more tolerable because of them. I would highly recommend this firm to anyone who seeks legal representation. For myself, I don’t think I would ever do business with another firm because of my highly positive experience.

This office came highly recommended to me by two separate individuals. From my  first conversation with John Biller it was clear this firm was comprised of caring and attentive attorneys. It was a long and at times difficult road, but I always had the support  and the attentiveness to my case that one expects. I could not be happier with the outcome and will always be appreciative and grateful for all they did for me.
Best service
Fantastic staff, timely response to any concerns and phone calls. Very appreciative of the commitment to my case.

We experienced a devastating total loss fire on a single family investment property and our insurance company denied the claim.  We were distraught and really did not know where to turn.  We were advised to hire an attorney and met with Jon Biller to get his thoughts on the matter.  We were extremely impressed with his understanding of the law pertaining to our dilemma and hired his firm.  Wow, did we make the right decision.  Jon assigned attorney Alison Gillotti from his team to quarterback our fight and got to work right away.
Jon and Alison mapped out a strategy which included hiring properly experienced investigators, adjusters and consultants to lay the groundwork for our battle against the insurance company.  They communicated with us every step of the way and guided us through the decision making process.  Jon Biller provided us with the timeliest and most cost effective representation resulting in a mediated agreement that got us our property back free and clear, the bank satisfied and the insurance company agreeing to settle.   In addition, the dark cloud of suspicion hanging over us as distressed homeowners was completely cleared.
We are so happy to have found Jon and Alison to help us with this predicament.  One of the biggest things is that they quickly turned a very stressful situation into a more comfortable fight.  At the end of the day, we don’t think that we could have been represented any better.  Jon and Alison knew what needed to be done and effectively and efficiently got the insurance company to settle.
