They are all about the client and oh boy it was great having them on MY side. Special Thank You to Attorney AG, for going to bat for me above and beyond- you are a phenomenal attorney. Me and my girls appreciate you tons.

Jon Biller was as unique as the absent “h” in his first name. He and his team accurately visualized the “take” of the insurance companies – knew when to press forward in anticipation of resistance and counter arguments, took into account age and other limiting factors, and pressed on with the best interests of the client. My experience with Biller, Sachs, Zito & LeMoult was a grateful plus.

Brett Gorman was incredibly sharp and composed, always prepared and never intimidated by the challenges that came our way. His ability to stay focused and strategic throughout the entire process gave me confidence even when things felt uncertain.
Kim and Kristi were phenomenal—organized, responsive, and genuinely kind. They kept everything on track, made sure I understood what was happening, and were always available when I had questions. Their attention to detail and steady communication made a stressful situation feel manageable.
In the end, we were successful, and I truly believe it was because of their dedication and expertise. I’m beyond grateful for the care, professionalism, and persistence they showed from start to finish. If you’re looking for a legal team that will fight for you and treat you with respect every step of the way, Moore, O'Brien & Foti is the one.

Well, I took the time to write about this office because I started a residency application process, and when the process began, the full payment was made. At first, everything was fine. I never met the lawyer. It was always contact with secretaries or "associates." In reality, as time went by, we didn't hear anything from them, not even to say hello, much less regarding the case. I understand the pandemic and that times change, but in my case, there is nothing to hide. Everything is real. Honestly, this office left a lot to say. Personally, I do not recommend it. In the end, they let my work permit expire. They are only interested in money and not the well-being of their clients or the effort they make. Up to that point, everything was slow, but I had resigned myself. But finally, there was another process regarding another request, and a new contract was signed, which stated that payment would be made in two parts. The first one was made, and the next one was scheduled for February 7, 2021. They released it on January 28 without authorization, according to them, because there was a contract, but the date was not as agreed, and a problem began between us. For a few months I was trying to contact them and they did not return my call, they only took my message but there was never an answer. The long-awaited appointment for immigration arrived and the lawyer did not even let us get to the immigration office where our appointment was scheduled, but he, by his own decision, suggested that we had to cancel it because he was having problems with the agent who would interview me. To this day I am still waiting for the lawyer's call and here is the evidence, today it turns out that I am the problem. They believe that someone with enough professionalism does what they do. I recommend that you check the images so they cannot say that these defamation. And yet they think they are going to scare me and send me a sheet telling me that if the calls continue they will call the police. The one who insisted on continuing the case with you was my husband. Personally, I am grateful to GOD that I no longer have any more contact with you. I also leave you the image of the note they sent and to you from the office I leave a message here you can file your report with the police if you believe it is correct just as you have the messages, I have them to prove it I also have the contract and the account statement where you withdrew the agreed payment ahead of time, however I have a lawyer who advises me and I sent you the number by text who is aware of the case and before you resigned from your representation I had requested a new representation so believe me that you are not going to know anything about me not even to ask you the weather or the time but here I do leave you who are looking for a comment to know if you can trust this office personally I do not recommend it because you will never have direct contact with the lawyer of a year and a half more or less what I wasted my time and my money with them I only saw him twice and if you do not pay the money in full believe me that they will collect if they call, of that I am very sure. Mancini law firm showed a deep knowledge of workers’ compensation law and navigated the complexities of my claim with confidence. Their familiarity with state regulations and the nuances of workplace injury cases was clear from our first meeting. I felt assured that my case was in capable hands, and their ability to explain legal concepts in plain language helped me understand each step of the process.
Throughout my case, the attorney kept regular contact, answering questions promptly and keeping me updated on developments. Their communication was clear, respectful, and proactive, making a complicated process far less overwhelming.
The lawyer’s commitment to securing a fair outcome was unwavering. Literally! Because originally the insurance company low balled! With the type of injury I had and it being my main dominant side. Mr Mancini would not fold. He negotiated skillfully with the insurance company and stood for me assertively during hearings.  The law firm's attention to detail and thorough preparation made a noticeable difference in the final settlement.
Beyond legal ability, the lawyer showed genuine empathy for my situation. They listened carefully to my concerns and supported me during a stressful time. Their encouragement and guidance helped me feel valued and empowered throughout the claim.
Nick himself is a very compassionate individual. And with my case he worked vigorously. Especially with me being a single mother. Needing several surgeries. And he went against one of New Englands biggest insurance companies. And one of the largest family chain owned businesses in CT and probably Tri - State Area.

I highly recommend Nick and his team to anyone facing a work-related injury. Their blend of professionalism, ability, and compassion sets them apart.
If you are considering representation for a workers’ comp case, seek out a lawyer who embodies these qualities—a true advocate who will stand by you from start to finish.

Thank you for Everything Nick

reviews.text:
I met Dan a year and a half ago after a horrible experience with another attorney at the start of my divorce. My case was extremely complex, and I had no idea what to do or who to trust. From the very first consultation, it was clear that he not only had my best interests at heart, but also genuinely cared about his work and his clients.

Dan was always upfront about his fees, honest about the pros and cons of different options, and available whenever I needed guidance. More than that, he was compassionate, patient, and understanding of the challenges that come with going through a divorce. His dedication never wavered—his empathy, energy, and commitment remained constant throughout the entire year-and-a-half process.

If you’re looking for an attorney who takes an active interest in your case rather than simply going through the motions, do yourself a favor and book a consultation with Dan. It was the best decision I made, and I truly couldn’t have gotten through this without his help.

It’s also important to know how an attorney performs in trial. Filing paperwork is one thing; questioning and cross-examining in the courtroom is another. To be effective, an attorney needs to be quick, prepared, and fully invested in the case. Dan was all of these things and more. His passion for his work was obvious, and he entered that courtroom thoroughly prepared every single time.

Thank you Dan and everyone at the office for your hard work and dedication.

I highly recommend Attorney Miller and his office.  Attorney Miller helped to guide me through the process in a way that helped me to make confident and informed decisions. He was very kind and answered all of my questions in a timely manner. I’m very grateful to have had Attorney Miller on my team while going through my divorce.

Attorney Daniel Miller and his entire legal team are absolutely amazing.  He combines extensive knowledge and experience with a friendly and caring personality.  I must mention Daniel’s paralegal Lauren, also knowledgeable, friendly and always ready to help.
Through the years he successfully represented me in real estate matters, including properties located outside of Connecticut, family matters, including divorce, traffic violation matters, including criminal offence.  In all cases, he achieved his goals by navigating the legal landscape with ease and determination.
In conclusion, to maximize the chances of a successful legal outcome, I strongly recommend having attorney Daniel Miller on your side...!

reviews.text: Attorney Miller represented me as a plaintiff in an estate matter.. His advice and counsel were rock solid and his attempts to resolve the matter without litigation were stellar to say the least. I would engage Attorney Miller again without hesitation! Hes the nest!

Attorney Miller is a very nice, supportive and cooperative to his clients. He handles the case whole heartedly and never becomes impatient while talking to his client. His office representative Sarah is also a very nice person. Their law office is highly recommended.
Amazing. Supportive, excellent communication. We had someone in our corner who fought for our family and the outcome we deserved.

I cannot say enough how wonderful Attorney Miller handle my very difficult divorce. Having no experience in legal matters, I found Dan patient in explaining everything to me as well as having a very calming, confident demeanor which I found was very reassuring.
He is very knowledgeable, experienced and detail oriented and nothing got by him no matter what the opposing attorney put in front of him. Dan cares about his clients and their children and wants the best for them. He and his fabulous assistant Sara filed every motion, responded to every email and phone call in a timely professional manner. I was kept informed of strategy, procedures and next steps. He made sure I understood and answered all of my questions.
In court, Dan presented my case brilliantly and he was completely and totally prepared. If you are divorcing you either know or will soon know that the courts do not work in a timely fashion. To the frustration of the attorneys and their clients we are kept waiting for each court date. After many court dates, court delays and court procedures, I could not be happier with the results. I felt we were a team working together the whole time. Gratefully, I trusted him completely. There is no one I would have rather had on my side than Attorney Dan Miller.

My lawyer, Dan has a thorough knowledge of the law & defended my case with determination. I highly recommend this law firm. Choosing Dan will be my 1st choice, as always - when it comes to having a lawyer. And I will recommend Dan to all my family/friends if needed.

Attorney Miller was very professional while also down to earth. I was new to the process for our legal needs and I felt comfortable asking him any question I had. He took the time to explain it to us in detail and advise us on the steps and process. He kept us informed throughout and I definitely will use him again. Overall great experience with Attorney Miller and would definitely recommend.

Attorney Miller was beyond excellent. Our house sale was moving quickly and up against an aggressive timeline. Dan Miller was quick, efficient, while taking the time to explain everything to us in great detail so that we were comfortable with the process. We have used him in the past for many other legal needs as well - always professional, informative & thorough. We definitely recommend Attorney Miller if you’re looking for a 5 star Attorney!

The office was incredibly fast to reach out to me with a personalized (not just computer generated email) after I sent a message inquiring about retaining an attorney for an upcoming court case. Both Daniel and Artila were highly recommended to me by a trusted friend. Daniel accompanied me to my court date and was extremely prepared as well as very knowledgeable. The office had less than 2 weeks to prepare for my court date and everyone worked as fast and effectively as possible to prepare. Everyone I encountered was pleasant, understanding, and went above and beyond. Daniel took his time reviewing all documents and was extremely thorough while going through all proposed orders in my custody matter. He was honest with me and told me that certain things I was asking for would likely not be granted and he didn’t want me to spend more money if the outcome would likely not be in my favor. I didn’t feel as though he was just going along with whatever I wanted just to rack up the bill. I truly feel as though he, as well as everyone in his firm, care about their clients and deliver personalized services. Daniel was very understanding and helped me feel at ease during a very stressful time and I’m incredibly grateful for him, Artila, and everyone at the firm.

Do not let the amount of reviews, ratings and super lawyer awards fool you. It’s all nonsense.

I hired Attorney Miller to represent me for my divorce case. Five months in, as multiple filings and charges were made and I’m waiting for the court date, nothing has been communicated to me and I’m completely lost as to what is happening and what to expect. I never heard from Attorney Miller he never checked in with me once throughout the 5 months, we never had a settlement discussion nor what his game plan and what the possible outcome could look like. I wrote a long email to them discussing my concerns about their lack of communication. Never even acknowledged my email. I received an email back from the paralegal saying that he wanted to meet with me in person and gave me a few dates before my court date with the lawyer (meet with me for what? No documents or evidence has been prepared, he never spoke to me, knew nothing about what I was going through). What are you coming to court with me just to sit next to me so you can collect a nice check from me? Attorney Miller has zero empathy or compassion for what I’m going through I was just thrown to the side, he didn’t care about helping me with my case at all.

His paralegal Sara was responsive. However was only eager when it came to filings and charges. Nothing was ever explained to me throughout these 5 months. I had zero guidance or support. I was completely lost through this whole process not knowing what to expect. On top of that multiple errors were found on my invoice that had to be revised. All Sara cared about was collecting her money and on top of that up charging me. Every time I questioned her about something she gave me an attitude which is extremely unprofessional.

Thank god I fired him as my attorney before the court date because I would not feel comfortable with Attorney Miller or his paralegal Sara representing me through my divorce. Just sharing my experience to whoever reads reviews. You can decide for yourself whether you want to hire Attorney Miller to represent you for your case. I personally would not recommend him. Save your money and find another attorney that actually cares and wants to fight for you.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Joy,

In my almost 17 years of practice I have never had such a difficult client. Everything you requested of my office we did. You sought to reconcile with your husband and we filed the appropriate motions. You sought to continue court dates and we filed the appropriate motions. You objected to dates being moved and again, we filed the appropriate motions. Your frustration is with how long the process takes, and for that, I can’t apologize. It’s not in my control. Yesterday, we spoke on the phone cordially and you requested I reduce my bill. Even though my time was accurate, I agreed and refunded you your retainer after reducing my bill. I have never had a client complain that they shouldn’t have to pay for a motion to be filed because it was denied by a judge! How is that in my control? Quite honestly, I am extremely happy to not have you as a client any longer. Best of luck with your divorce and more importantly, the next attorney who you hire. They should know what they are getting themselves into.

I would not recommend. Had his office appointed as a gal. He acted like he didn’t want to do the job to begin stating the state doesn’t pay.. he took it nonetheless. 5 months later nothing was done, Scheduled visits missed by his office, and continuances filed even as I was being kept from my children. Upon calling the office to express myself and ask why, I got a receptionist who allowed me to speak. When I was done her response was , I’m just a receptionist, but I’ll get the message to him. Few hours later he calls me back , first time ever, only to convert my relief of a call back into panick and worry as he was saying things I never said making false accusations. This prompted me to actually look the man up and the history of him and his office. What I found was he was a prosecutor, in 2014-2017. Never asked me never informed of this important part as he tried a case in Waterbury of that year! Conflict conflict conflict.. Needless to say , he’s overwhelmed, ill advised and whatever practices he initially went by , are now out the door due to case load and lack of appreciation in general for his  ethics. If you get him I suggest finding another. Just my review

Attorney Miller provides tried and true legal guidance with a passionate regard for upholding the letter of the law. His diligent efforts and genuine dedication to his clients needs are why I highly recommend his firm.

I recently had a false restraining order brought against my wife and I. We hired Dan to represent us.  He was confident, straight to the facts and really proved the case in our defense. He made the plaintiff really look like a fool and pointed out the reasons why the plaintiff brought on the false restraining order. I felt so proud to have Dan by our side representing us. 10/27/23

reviews.text: The Law offices of Daniel Miller were absolutely amazing! Dan Miller helped me with my custody case that had been dragging on for two years, previously being in a different state. reviews.text:
If you or someone you love is in need of a personal injury law firm, I highly recommend Trantolo & Trantolo for their superior performance in handling cases with the expertise needed to achieve the best possible outcome for each of their clients.

My sister was a pedestrian when struck by a motor vehicle; she was severely injured and unable to address attaining an attorney amidst her hospitalization and surgery. When she asked me to find a good attorney, I immediately contacted Trantolo & Trantolo. A principal attorney visited my sister within the first few days of her hospitalization. Every aspect of the legal process to begin was thoroughly explained to us at her bedside. We were told a firm attorney, Mike Snellings, would handle her case.

Atty Mike Snellings was sensitive to my sister's need to focus on healing and met with us once she felt more comfortable upon transfer to a rehabilitation center. We never had to visit the law office because Atty Snellings came to us for all needed consultations and paperwork, regardless of where or how far away my sister was situated. That alone made the entire process one of ease and comfort.

Atty Mike Snellings focused on the case with much diligence, dedication and compassion  throughout the process. He truly exemplifies what every client hopes to find in his or her attorney - knowledge, experience, perseverance, and genuine concern for one's best interest. His calm demeanor and taking the reign on legal matters helped us during a most stressful time. We held much confidence in Atty Snellings because his professional skills were evident in his proficiency, excellent communications, quick responsiveness to any questions and his ongoing progress. I know of other personal injury cases, all far less complex than my sister's situation, that took years to conclude. Atty Snellings navigated through all and brought this chapter of my sister's unfortunate event to a very favorable, satisfactory conclusion in less than eight months! We are forever grateful for the exceptional and speedy work of Atty Snellings of Trantolo & Trantolo.

Pam Knapp
reviews.ownerResponse:
Thank you so much for your heartfelt review, Pam! We're honored that you trusted us to handle your sister’s case during such a challenging time. It’s especially meaningful to hear that Attorney Mike Snellings and our team were able to provide the support, compassion and expertise needed to guide her through the legal process to a favorable resolution.

Your kind words about our responsiveness and personalized client care reinforce why we're passionate about helping families in need. If you or your loved ones need us again in the future, we are here for you. Thank you again for sharing your experience and for recommending our firm!

reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for updating your review. Your edited comment now raises an extremely serious allegation regarding a conflict of interest. reviews.text:
Dear Attorney Martocchio

I want to sincerely thank you for helping my family during such an important & emotional time in our lives.
As you know, my husband & I have a special needs child, my biggest concern has always been making sure he is cared for & given the best possible chance to succeed in life. With my husband on permanent disability, finances can be tight & the stress can feel overwhelming at times. Navigating the court system on top of that felt almost impossible.

You took the time to consult with me, explain our options, and guided us through the process with patience & compassion. What meant the most to us was that your focus was never on how you would get paid, but on how you could truly help our family. That kind of integrity and heart is rare.

We are incredibly grateful that we were referred to you. Your support has made a lasting difference in our lives, & we will never forget it.

With sincere appreciation, Brenda

reviews.text:
I had only awful experience with Denise Bradley as my attorney from Law Offices of Gregory Allen P.C. She is highly unprofessional and did not do her job properly. She did not answer to my questions when I asked. She answered to my emails but not to the questions that I originally asked and I was charged for not answered questions. When I told her I have an issue being charged while I don’t get answers she said she answered to my email. Her email said that she needs to talk to her paralegal and she will get back with the answer. Week passed by and I have not heard anything from her but got charged. She could let me know during that week that she is still trying to get the answers and keep me posted what is going on. I felt like I am in a DARK while dealing with Denise. Also she forgot for 3 weeks to let me know that she could not find any therapist for my daughter. I had to ask her again after 3 weeks and only then She said she did not find anyone who takes Husky insurance. How about letting me know that at some point during that 3 weeks of period while I was waiting for her to find a therapist. She acts like she does not understand why I am upset. She said she never talked to my daughter and she is a big layer because my daughter and I stopped by to the office on the 12th of March, 2025 to drop off some paperwork and I introduced my daughter to her and asked to find a therapist. Denise looked at my daughter and asked if she would be willing to talk to one. My daughter answered yes. When I reminded this to Denise she acted that she does not remember that because she needs some kind of permission to talk to a child. She definitely asked my daughter a question and we both remember it very well. All off this could been fixed if Denise apologized and admitted that she is wrong but she kept arguing with me. At this point I lost all the trust in her and I don’t respect her as attorney at all.  I never had such an unprofessional rude attorney in the past who does not do a good job and does not admit her mistakes.

When people get a lawyer they want the communication go easy and with respect and all questions answered. Lawyers suppose to take most anxiety off from clients and not add extra anxiety and stress. I am more than disappointed about Denise and her work. It was waste of money and time. I wish I could get all money back for this because nothing was done in one month.

Today April 2nd, 2025 I received an email from Gregory Allen himself saying he will look into it. He came back saying that Denise did everything right and that she never questioned my daughter because they need signed permission. I did not expect any other answer from him. I saw couple more people had issues with Denise and exactly the same thing happened. Denise should not be an attorney who works under the LAW because she is a big liar. It will be hard to trust any other attorney because of her and Gregory Allen’s law.

Update: I just picked up my documents from this law firm and my ex husband’s last name is misspelled. It’s 4 typos in his last name. My exes last name is KUBILINSKAS.

Please people stay away from this firm. Even Gregory Allen said Denise did nothing wrong and I know they are covering the behinds.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Thank you for your feedback. We value all input, whether positive or negative as it helps us improve our services.

I will respond generally here as I have already responded privately to you. Yes. Attorney Bradley was trying to assist you in finding a provider who accepted your insurance. She even called around to other professionals for recommendations trying to find someone for you. She did this, met with you and responded to several of your emails all at no charge.

It is also our firm policy that we do not talk to the children in cases we are working on. I spoke with Attorney Bradley about this issue. She was able to provide significant details to lead me to believe this policy was complied with.

I wish you all the best and thank you again for your feedback and the opportunity to review our policies and procedures to ensure we are providing the best service we can to our clients.

reviews.text: Seems like a decent law firm but it wasn’t the right fit for me. I worked with Alissa Korwek for 2 months and she literally did NOTHING for my case- she didn’t even inform the courts that she was representing me. She was supposed to refile paperwork for me and never did. I decided to no longer retain her after numerous unreturned phone calls and emails. I tried to give her the benefit of the doubt since she’s a novice attorney. If you decide to use this firm, work with anyone but her.

Unless your opposition is without counsel, I recommend anyone but Greg Allen. Throughout my case he has delayed filing, sent paralegals in his place in court who underrepresented myself and my daughter, was completely unresponsive 90 percent of the time, and when pressed for answers about my case with pending motions filed, I got 0 help and he dropped me as a client because it was easier than doing the job he was paid for. I was never in contact when he was to be out of office for weeks at a time, I went weeks with multiple emails unanswered, and I recommend anyone but him for custody cases.

Edit to owner: If Alyssa is a lawyer then that’s laughable. You waited weeks to file, didn’t inform me when things were filed, I went weeks and multiple emails without response and when I asked you why, you said you were tired of defending your decisions, yet I never even got any decisions because you wouldn’t respond. Again, I recommend anyone thinking of using this attorney do a lot of shopping before he takes your money and wastes 7 months of you and your family’s time.
reviews.ownerResponse: While I continue to wish you and your daughter all the best, as I mentioned to you earlier, we will not be able to represent you further.  For the sake of privacy I will not reiterate the numerous communications with our office, including myself, nor will I discuss the merits of filing motions you requested in your case.  I will, however, note none of our paralegals attend court.  The individuals you are referring to are attorneys.

Jeremy and Shane at Jeremy Taylor Law are one of the BEST attorney offices in the state!  I have had an exceptional experience working with them for the last 15 years representing my real estate clients.
They have been professional, knowledgeable, and incredibly responsive. They have guided me and my clients, ensuring all documents were handled efficiently and that everyone understood my legal rights and obligations.  But what truly sets them apart has been their attention to detail and commitment to client satisfaction. They have anticipated potential issues before they arose, making the closing process seamless and stress-free.  I highly recommend Jeremy Taylor Law for their expertise and top-notch service pertaining to all legal matters and especially for real estate and estate planning.

My wife and I have sold two homes and purchased one with the help of Jeremy and Shane. They have always made the legal/paperwork side of things so easy and straightforward! Whatever your legal needs may be this is the team you are looking for! I cannot recommend them enough.

Terrible experience.He was the attorney who handled the sale of my house.Told me the wire transfers were not safe, and once the money was wired to him he would send via USPS and it would clear next day after deposit. This was false. The bank manager in my new state wondered why he would tell me this. It takes 6 days for an out-of-state check to clear according to my bank which also has plenty of branches in CT. This is not a mom and pop Bank. It's all over New England and the southern states there's over 1100 branches. Why did he lie to me? What is he doing? He must be up to something. Think about it. I'm not the only whose home sales? He oversees all that money sitting in his account until it clears. Don't be naive. In my opinion, the reason he lied to me do not trust this man neither you
Jeremy Taylor Law Office is one of the best that I have worked with.  The attorney and paralegal are organized, friendly and knowledgeable!
This firm put up with a lot of complications with my house closing I see and appreciate that. Communication could be improved but over all handled everything well.

My husband and I just purchased our first home, and Shane and Jeremy made the whole process simple. They took care of everything, worked hard behind the scenes to make everything fall into place, and took the time to explain things we had questions about. They were friendly and responsive and on top of the whole process. I’d highly recommend them!

Jeremy and Shane was a referral for me and my husband through Chad Segal our realtor  , who pointed us to  Attroney Jeremy to close on our new home . I tell ' you . Shane did an amazing job with the  process. She answered all my questions and made me feel like she was with us all the way, as if she wanted us to win . We did not have to worry about anything . We thank you both for your easy going process ! And I recommend this law office to everyone . Thanks a million ! We are homeowners now !!!!!!!

Do not get to that office in any way . do not let your reinstate agent tell you they are good.  if you see that name run away. they do no answer calls what so ever they don't call back and they don't answer emails. they were recommended for me by the real state agent and was nothing but nigh mare from day one. I'm very mad been calling and emailing for hours and days  for my house closing and they did not even call me back.
reviews.authorName: Daddy daughter day adventures DDD adventures

reviews.text: Jeremy and his right hand gal Friday Shane are the team you need when legal issues arise.  Thoughtful, competent, friendly, and hard working, they absolutely get the job done! It is a pleasure to have them in my corner when I need legal advice. -gb

We recently used Jeremy Taylor for his services after my aunt had passed away. We needed help with having her house going through probate. Jeremy and Shane from the office couldn't have done a better job! They were always accommodating and their response time to calls and/or emails was very impressive.  Jeremy is extremely knowledgeable regarding the probate system and the needs of his clients. I highly recommend his law office for any of your legal needs! Extremely professional and we couldn't have had a better experience.

Jeremy and Shane are a powerhouse!!  They assisted me in the closing of my mother’s condo earlier this month. I live out of state which made things a little more challenging, but they made the entire process seamless and treated me wonderfully from the first time I contacted their office. They even went above, and beyond as they needed another document for my mother, and they made a personal visit to her, I am deeply appreciative for their attention, care and professionalism.
Jeremy and Shane rock. It's a seamless process whenever I deal with either of them. I highly recommend their services.
Great Law Firm to work with for all of your Real Estate closings. Most notable, Shane and Jeremy were able to complete a time sensitive closing in less than 9 days. Absolutely incredible service!

Jeremy and Shane are the best! They are  thorough in explaining everything, professional, and took care of us every step of the way. We felt confident we were in very good hands throughout the process of selling and buying our homes. Highly recommend!

Attorney Taylor has been my go to in real estate and estate planning services for just under 10 years. The office has provided support in home purchases in Southington and estate planning for my mother. They are attentive, supportive, and knowledgeable. I highly recommend!

I have had multiple experiences with attorney Jeremy Taylor and would highly recommend his law office.  He and Shane do a fantastic job of explaining things each step of the way.  They provided answers to all my questions and communicate at the highest level.  Attorney Taylor has handled multiple real estate closings for me as well as will/trust/estate planning.  I would not go anywhere else for these needs.
Jeremy Taylor handled the closing on my new home and it was such a wonderful experience, I went back to have him update my estate plan. Outstanding service and a pleasure to work with.
Professional. Courteous. Prompt. Fair priced. Always answers the phone and emails
I highly recommend Taylor Law. Attorney Taylor and Shane are always available to answer any questions my clients or I may have. They are a great team to work with on any transaction.

I have gone to Jeremy for 2 closings and I absolutely would not go anywhere else! Both he and Shane are the best to work with. Answer any and all questions in a timely manner and definitely made my real estate transactions less stressful.
Great experience with this office getting title search for a  property.  Very attentive to my many phone calls and all my questions were answered throughout the home-buying experience.
Made every step of my home closing experience so smooth and enjoyable!

I highly recommend The Law Office of Jeremy Taylor.
They have helped me with several transactions. Throughout the process, Jeremy and Shane have been very professional. They pay attention to the details, are easy to talk to, and offer excellent service.
Shane and Jeremy are great, they’re incredibly thorough and communicate throughout the whole process. I used them for both buying a home and selling

It was very comforting to work with Attorney Taylor and Shane for what can be a stressful process.  They took the time to address all of our questions and concerns without making us feel foolish.  They guided us through the legal process, step-by-step, of selling our first home and contracting with a builder for the construction our second home.  I'd go right back to them without a second thought for our future real estate transactions.

I have purchased two homes and sold a home in the past two years and have had great service with Jeremy Taylor and his team. Very responsive and able to do closings quickly and efficiently. Great group to work with!

I highly recommend Attorney Jeremy Taylor's office. They were a pleasure to work with during my home buying process. Jeremy and Shane were very professional and they took great care to explain everything. Jeremy and Shane are thorough and skilled professionals and I'm glad I selected Attorney Jeremy Taylor's office.
Both Attorney Taylor and Shane were excellent with help buying my first house. Professional, Courteous, and Knowledgeable. Would gladly work with them again.
Shane and Jeremy were great with the sale and purchase of our houses!! I would highly recommend them to anyone!!! We will definitely go with them again in the future!

Excellent service. Very nice Staff. Extremely happy with their service overall as they were efficient and  seemed to be very knowledgeable and assertive for doing what was needed to help me get my house closed.  I  highly recommend

Mortgage closing made simple. Could not have asked for a better experience. Shane was awesome to work with. By the time I met with Jeremy everything was taken care of. Still, he took the time to make sure I understood everything and was also a pleasure to work with. Everything should be so easy!

The Best!!!  Attorney Jeremy Taylor and staff are good people and also very professional, friendly and are experts in their work. Quality representation-they know what your needs are. We used their office for a couple transactions already and will be our go to. Shouts out to Shane thanks a lot.
Jeremy Taylor is friendly and professional and I would recommend Jeremy Taylor to anyone 👍

I highly recommend Attorney Taylor's office.  In addition to having a wealth of knowledge and experience, they are truly a pleasure to work with.  Setting up a will or buying a home can be such a stressful process. Jeremy and Shane take great care to explain everything and help clients feel comfortable. They are thorough and skilled professionals, you can be confident they will effectively advocate for your needs.

I recently purchased my first home and hired the Law Office of Jeremy Taylor, LCC for the closing, etc. Jeremy, Morgan, and Shane were very professional and responsive and took time to answer all of my noob questions. They probably would have physically held my hand if I had asked them to.
They made our experience easy and painless as could be. I would highly recommend them for first-time home buyers!

Attorney Jeremy Taylor and Shane are absolutely the best law firm in Connecticut hands-down !
Thank you very much,
for making our small business a reality !!!

Jeremy, Shane and Morgan are a pleasure to work with! They made the closing for my parents new home so easy and walked them through every step of the way. Jeremy answered all of their questions and had everything prepared to sign away! Highly recommend this office for all your closing needs!
Attorney Taylor and staff provided prompt and excellent service in the purchase of our home. Highly recommend.

We are first time home buyers, and were nervous about the process. Attorney Taylor, Shane and Morgan were extremely responsive, and answered all of our questions. At the closing, Attorney Taylor explained everything simply without talking down, and made us feel comfortable while still being professional. We would use Attorney Taylor and his team again in a heartbeat!
This was our first time buying a home and Jeremy Taylor and his team made it easy for us. We couldn't ask for more. Thank you!

I highly recommend this law firm for anyone dealing with tenant issues in the Waterbury area. They kept me informed every step of the way, and thanks to their expertise, the issue was quickly resolved. I'm very grateful for their help!

reviews.text: I was referred to Tony by my attorney. MY attorney confided in me that he was over his head in what was described as a "labor law" issue and that he, himself used Tony not just for his own needs, but for any clients needing labor law expertise.  Tony was very understanding and patient with me throughout the entire process.  He was very fair and efficient with his and his staff's time, and sensitive to my budget, yet without compromising expertise.  He and his staff's communications were excellent and their responsiveness very timely.  In the end, he achieved one of our key goals, that of avoiding a lengthy court battle.  We settled successfully out of court and I am now able to move on from what has been a very stressful situation.  Thank you Tony, and your team!

My wife and I had an excellent experience with Tony Minchella and the Minchella Law Firm.  Tony was very easy to work with, as was everyone at the Law Firm that we interacted with. Everyone was Professional, Knowledgeable, Courteous and very Understanding.
We have suggested the Minchella to others!

I was referred to Attorney Anthony Minchella (Tony) during an employee dispute that escalated into a potential civil suit. I had never been through anything like this before and was unfamiliar with the legal process, so I was understandably concerned about how it would impact my business.

From our first virtual consultation and conference call, Tony was informative, direct, and extremely knowledgeable. It truly felt like a “101 on employee matters.” He took the time to answer all of my questions, explained how the process works, and immediately put me at ease. He then handled all communications with opposing counsel and guided the matter strategically.

Tony drafted a thorough agreement and general release of all claims, which ultimately led to a successful settlement out of court and the other attorney dropping all claims. That outcome allowed my company to move forward without the burden, expense, and distraction of litigation.

What I appreciated most was his availability, local reputation, and deep understanding of employment matters. I felt confident the entire time that he had both my company’s and my personal best interests in mind.

I would absolutely work with him again and highly recommend his services to any business owner navigating employee-related issues.

If I could give Minchella & Associates, LLC
a 6 star, I would!
I was facing a very daunting lawsuit in federal court, in the hundreds of thousands of dollars. I was locked out of my home hospital and a 13 year job/position I created, for a non compete clause in my contract that was very unfortunate. Very stressful!

Tony and his team were extremely professional and reassuring through this process. Everyone I had occasion to work with was always very nice and attentive to my needs through the whole ordeal. The client portal was easy to navigate and use, and someone always got back to me in a timely matter.

Tony was great to have on my side, he was knowledgeable, thorough and professional every step of the way. Put simply I would not him on "the other side", for sure.

The main thing, besides winning the case, of course, was how comforting he was through it all.

It was not a pleasurable situation by any means, but Tony and his firm were reassuring and personable and made it tolerable.

I'd highly recommend working with Minchella and Associates.

Dr Bill Goliber

My father is a United States Air Force veteran. Attorney Minchella graciously accepted to represent my father pro bono. He and his staff worked diligently, timely and meticulously to achieve a result far greater than our expectations.
The firms attention to detail, timely follow up, clear explanation of all questions and concerns was outstanding. Their expertise and responsiveness achieved a favorable outcome. The firm displayed personal concern, respect and integrity.
Thankful for all your time, genuine professionalism, and sincere consideration to help my dad and our family went above and beyond.
With our gratitude for a job well done!

Before coming to this law firm, we were dealing with a situation that was seriously weighing on us. We were nervous, overwhelmed, and honestly scared to take legal action because we didn’t know what to expect or whether it would even be worth it.

They represented us through the entire process and made everything feel clear and manageable from the start. We chose this firm because they were highly recommended and we could immediately tell they were professional, experienced, and genuinely cared about helping us — not just rushing us through.

What we appreciated most was how easy they made everything. They took care of the details from start to finish, kept us updated, answered every question we had, and made us feel supported the whole way through. We never felt judged or brushed off — just listened to and taken seriously.

The outcome was better than we ever could’ve imagined, and we’re truly grateful. If we ever need an attorney again in the future, we wouldn’t hesitate to come right back.

I was the subject of a car repair shop employee, stealing my vehicle basically after stating it was not road worthy and having a motor vehicle accident. This individual proceeded to place claims against my insurance company as well as the victims in the other vehicle. I had a family attorney who referred me the Anthony Minchella since he was more familiar with motor vehicle laws. Attorney Minchella immediately put my mind to ease that all would be ok with our initial meeting. The firm represented me in all of the following court proceedings. After a few court hearings a few of the lawsuits against me were dropped, since attorney Minchella showed the court and other party’s that i had no involvement in the incident. After a year all the lawsuits against me and claims against my insurance company were dropped. I now have a life that is eased of mind and no worry about someone taking my life stability away from me and my family all
Because of the work of the Michella Law firm. I will use them in any of my future attorney needs.

Thank you

I have only high praise for the team at Minchella Law. I had been injured in a fall and a lawyer friend of mine suggested I contact Tony Minchella. Throughout the long legal process, Tony was thoughtful, caring and highly professional. From the first time I met him I felt nothing but confidence in his handling of my case. There were multiple litigants involved, but Tony was a consummate negotiator. I had suffered a lot, and I was very pleased with the negotiated settlement. I highly recommend Minchella Law.

Truly cannot recommend Minchella Law enough! Our company was lured into borrowing a lot of money by aggressive marketing tactics under what we believed was false pretenses.  When the company refused to negotiate in good faith, and our business was at risk, we were referred to Attorney Tony Minchella who filed a lawsuit against the company, got an injunction against their attempts to collect funds based on an unfair trade practice, and sued for our business losses. The contracts were voided by the court, and we were awarded a high six figure judgment against the defendants! Even though this was a tumultuous time, Tony made the process so smooth. From start to finish, he was thorough, transparent, and truly had our best interests at heart. I would highly recommend Tony and his team for anyone in need of legal counsel.

Tony gave us invaluable advice and support to dissociate from a business and start a new business. The decision was an emotional one, but Tony laid out the pros and cons and legal implications so that we could make an informed, rational decision. Two years later, the new business is thriving, there have been no repercussions as a result of the dissociation, and we couldn't be happier. We have referred friends and colleagues to Tony's firm because he is incredibly knowledgeable and an all around great person to work with.

I was lucky enough to be introduced to and ultimately work with Tony, a lawyer remarked as one of the best in Ct, and I can’t recommend him enough. From the start, he was knowledgeable, caring, and was super dedicated to my case. I always felt like I was in good hands and never once felt judged. He’s not only really knowledgeable but also trustworthy and easy to talk to, which made the whole process so much less stressful. I’m really grateful for all his hard work and highly recommend him to anyone who needs a reliable and professional lawyer. It can be hard working with someone you don’t know during a difficult life event and if one thing can make it easier, it would be to work with Tony - he will immediately make you feel in good hands.

Our compliance attorney recommended Anthony Minchella to help us with a mortgage fraud case. Anthony and team took us in, understood the situation and went to work. We had a positive outcome and recouped all our money. We highly recommend the firm and, while hoping we never have another situation like this again, we'd certainly look for Anthony's expertise again. A+

My experience with the team at Minchella & Associates over the past several years has been fantastic. The service and attention to detail that they provide is remarkable, and it’s clear that they value their clients and their community. Not only do they work hard to earn the best results, but they also provide stress relief and confidence that you have a talented team advocating for you!

I was referred to Tony & his team by a close friend after an incident at work. Tony was very professional, empathetic, and knew all the ins & outs of my legal situation. The outcome was better than I ever imagined it could be. I am so grateful to have been referred to Tony and would use him again in a heartbeat!

Tony and his associates provided a professional experience and were able to answer all of my questions regarding a noncompete/non-solicitation agreement that I had signed.  The response to my initial experience was within a few business hours of my initial email.  Tony provided a consultation at a reasonable fee and I didn't feel nickel and dimed like I have with other law firms.  Tony answered all of my questions during the consultation and followed the meeting up with a summary email.  At this point, I don't believe I need further legal help with this issue, but if I do, I will call Minchella & Associated, LLC and know that they will handle my case in an expeditious and professional manner.

Tony and the team did an amazing job handling my case! I couldn't be happier with the outcome of my legal matter. The whole team was extremely supportive throughout the entire process. Tony was exceptionally thorough from start to finish, explaining each step of the case and what to expect next. This transparency made me feel very supported and at ease throughout the entire process.

Tony and his team always had my best interests at heart, and their dedication was evident in every interaction. I would highly recommend their law firm to anyone in need of legal guidance or assistance. I'm very appreciative of everything they did for me over the course of my case. Thank you, Tony & Team!

I have used Minchella Law for multiple situations over the years. And, have always had a very positive experience. Recently, had an employment matter we needed assistance with. Once again, everything was handled professionally, timely, and in an efficient manner. The communication, advice, and guidance through these matters are always top-notch. Will certainly be using Minchella law in the future for any matters that may arise.

Tony, John and the team did an amazing job handling my case & I couldn't be happier with the outcome. Great individuals who took their time to make sure everything got handled appropriately and walked me through each piece of the case as it unfolded. Felt very supported and very much trusted they all had my best interest at heart. Would definitely recommend to others to use their firm for whatever they might need - will definitely be the people I call if I need any help again in the future. Very very appreciative of everything over the time it took for my case to be finished - thank you guys!!!

Title: Felt Like a Severe Conflict of Interest and Betrayal

Our family retained Attorney Tim Moynahan based on a long-standing personal relationship and his assurances of loyalty. We were shocked and disappointed when his firm later initiated legal action against us in a related matter. The transition from a trusted "family friend" to an adversarial litigant felt like a profound betrayal of trust and a severe conflict of interest. Our experience suggests his personal allegiances are easily overridden by financial incentives. We cannot recommend his services and would caution others to get any representations of friendship in writing before proceeding.

Hired Tim Moynahan years ago, my stepdaughter’s grandmother lived in his townhouse on his property of Hitchcock Lake and he supposedly used to be friends with my dad when they were young to join. They asked him to join the Democrat party when they were believing he was a family friend. He was very friendly until it was time to act. His firm ultimately took legal action against us, proving that his initial kindness was disingenuous. A complete betrayal. We feel he is not to be trusted.

I heard they were good so I sent them an email asking if they could help me with my case.
Months after not receiving a response to my email, I sent a letter that took me three months to condense so that I wasnt sending them an eight page original document (since I know they are likely busy), while at the same time trying not to lose most of what I thought was important and relevant.

Months after sending the letter I still never received a response to either.

I guess my problem wasnt important enough to them to bother to reply or even tell me they wont help.

I recently made the decision right before my hearing to switch to a different attorney. After meeting him and speaking with his very professional and kind staff, I realized that my experience  with the initial application could and should have been very different with Attorney Spat - much more proactive and involved. It was a nervewracking decision, and I'm glad I made it. I no longer dread communicating with my attorney and am filled with new hope and confidence. I would encourage anyone going through this for the first time to research what an SSDI lawyer should do for you from the start, and also to consider going to an office that has additional staff that can assist. As Meryl told me over the phone, she doesn't have "a team of monkeys" who can answer her emails. The rest of that phone call is what made me decide to leave, and I wish I could drop the transcript here, but I found it to be extremely bizarre and unprofessional. While I am glad that others have benefitted from her knowledge and experience, I felt compelled to share this in case it helps anyone either feel not alone in their experiences with Meryl or to help someone decide on who to choose for representation during this very difficult and stressful process.

Best of luck on all your journeys! Know what you're worth and trust your gut.

reviews.text: I have CPTSD from life-long chronic trauma and treatment resistant depression. I have applied for disability 3 times from 2016-2020 and was denied so my therapist recommended this woman to me. It has been 4 years since I met her and I am traumatized from interacting with her. I think about how psychotic she is and how she belittled me. And then I think of all the other innocent clients she has done this to, how she needs to be STOPPED. She would email me asking to give her a call ASAP to discuss my case and when I called for the first time she berated and belittled me until I cried (this happened more than once.) Just like the other reviews say, she would act nice and put on this voice like Snow White and then she snaps out of nowhere. She would say ‘I HAVE TOO MANY CLIENTS!’ She never remembered who I was - I was doing her work for her. ‘WHY ARE YOU CALLING ME AND WASTING MY TIME? YOU ARE RESPONSIBLE FOR GATHERING ALL YOUR DOCUMENTS.’ She would talk to me and say the most outrageous insults about my character. She actually did some digging to find a reason for me not to be eligible for SSDI. She dug up a defamation letter a doctor wrote at Yale where I had done ECT 3x a week for 5 months. This doctor actually wrote a letter saying I told her I was only there to get ECT because I thought it would win my disability case. Why would anyone do that? ECT is scary and painful and has negative side effects. I had never said that or talked to this doctor and yet Meryl pulled it up and it was all to shame me ‘tsk tsk tsk most people wouldn’t work with you because of this but I’m going to help you so don’t worry. But you have to write a cease and desist letter to that doctor and continued to make me sweat with worry. I went from having my ECT sessions when I was in the psychiatric ward and moved my treatments to Yale outpatient. I have been with my therapist 7 years and she has so many notes on my condition that were sent to this attorney way before the scheduled hearing. She did not prep me for the hearing. I just don’t understand; why would she choose an attorney as a career when she hates people who are disadvantaged? She put me down for being disabled. Does she not want to get paid to win an easy case? It was all set up for me to fail and completely humiliated me. I had no clue how or when to speak, and was scolded by the judge. The attorney was asked questions but I was told to answer everything and the worst part of all - she said her computer wouldn’t turn on and said she didn’t have any of my documents. The judge told her to get them and was annoyed. He warned her about wasting his time again. All of this I tolerated only to be denied. She sent me an email months and months later after I already fired her and wrote if I wanted her to process an appeal I had to pay. She needs to be disbarred, without a doubt.

reviews.ownerResponse: NOTICE: This client has a disability appeal pending which I filed on her behalf. Her statements are, unfortunately, inaccurate. Her post reflects obvious frustration and expresses deep disappointment relating to the denial of her benefits to date. Many factors are considered in a disability claim. Unfortunately, not every individual who feels entitled to receive a government benefit has a meritorious claim. Attorneys do not guarantee every single person a successful outcome, particularly when claims, upon development, are significantly unsubstantiated. When claims are denied, they are denied based on reports of the medical providers. Those reports were carefully reviewed by a Judge in this case. Generally, cases are denied because the medical records have not substantiated a disabling condition. Disappointment can lead to rage in certain individuals. Despite this client's anger, misdirected at counsel, Attorney Spat continues to wish the claimant well.

reviews.text: Great firm !

I had an excellent experience with Loughlin Fitzgerald P.C. from start to finish. The entire team introduced themselves in a professional, responsive, and friendly manner making me feel welcome from the very beginning. This action was very telling that the firm genuinely cared about my case. To specify, the firm handled two major injury cases for my family– one for my mother and secondly for the estate of my father. They were involved in a fatal motorcycle crash in which they had no fault. In a time where I felt no power they provided stability and solace.
Throughout the whole process, I felt fully informed and comforted. Each member of the team was able to answer any questions, explain details clearly, and provided me with reassurance.
What truly stood out to my family was how compassionate and attentive they were with my mother, specifically Attorney John Conway. He would go above and beyond to make my mother’s process go as smoothly as possible; even visiting the hospital when needed. Since English is my mother’s second language, I was initially concerned about potential communication barriers. However, Attorney Conway went above and beyond, sourcing a local attorney who spoke Spanish to ensure she fully understood everything. Actions such as those reassured me that her case was not only in good hands but that it would be effective and stress-free.
I never once had a doubt in the efficiency of Loughlin Fitzgerald P.C. since they continuously showed their knowledge and dedication towards handing us a fair and justified settlement.
I am extremely pleased with their service and wholeheartedly recommend this firm to anyone looking for truly exceptional representation and care. In addition, because of the thoughtful accommodations and extra effort they made to ensure my mother fully understood each step of the process, I urge any members of the Spanish community to trust this firm with their cases. Their actions prove that their clients will receive the same patience, respect, and outstanding service.

I can’t say enough good things about this law office. From the very beginning, Dorothy was incredibly responsive. Every question I had was answered quickly and clearly. She guided me through the entire process with patience, professionalism, and care, making what could have been a stressful situation so much easier to handle.

Most importantly, she truly went above and beyond to make sure I understood each step and felt supported along the way. Her dedication and communication made all the difference. I highly recommend Dorothy to anyone looking for a firm that genuinely looks out for their clients.
This was my 1st time having to use a personal injury attorney. They are on top of the game, fast to respond and easy to work with. I would absolutely use their services in the future if needed.

Professionalism at every step of the process.  John was very knowledgeable and keenly interested in answering our questions, and perceptive enough to answer the questions we hadn't asked yet!  That is what one pays for when hiring an attorney - someone who can look at a situation from several different perspectives and then provide the appropriate legal advice.  John can quickly understand and then evaluate the different options that can be considered, the pros and cons of each, and then let you make a truly informed decision.
John's co-workers are top shelf.  They are very efficient and detail oriented.  Roseann, who was assisting John with our particular legal matter, was present throughout all our discussions with John.  She listened intently, taking notes of the key points, and at the same time demonstrated that she too understood the pertinent information.  They collaborated like two professionals that had many many years of experience working together.
Consider Loughlin & Fitzgerald for your legal matters and you will never second guess your choice.  All the BS that you hear about "attorneys" you can ignore.  They will provide the legal advice that you need.
I would absolutely use them again anytime anyone asks me I will always recommend them very helpful very kind and very understanding A+ plus

He understands what cases are worth, has solid relationships in the court system, and is well-respected as a professional.

This experience was so very personal for me and he always remembered that fact. He was also incredibly committed to getting me the best outcome possible and he did.

The only bright spot in my horrible experience was working with John and his team. If I had to do it all over again I would hire them in a heartbeat.

After meeting Attorney Jon Patrucco, I felt compelled to recommend him to anyone who may need legal help. He is professional, courteous, and truly considerate—even toward those impacted by your legal situation.

With over 30 years of experience, Attorney Patrucco is clearly an expert in his field. But he offers something even more valuable: peace of mind for his clients. That was certainly my experience, both for myself and my child. If I ever need legal assistance in the future, I will not hesitate to seek his counsel again.

Gave me some very useful advice regarding my situation. I plan on using every bit of that advice to move forward in getting my issues under control. If I do eventually require in-person representation, Atty. Patrucco will be my first call!
Very Knowledgeable
Mr Patrucco was very helpful with my needs.
super helpful, 30 minutes of advice over the phone asking for nothing in return...highly recommend

I had a consultation with Mr. Patrucco a few weeks ago and was incredibly impressed with his professionalism, patience and knowledge. He took the time to thoroughly explain the legal implications of my landlord eviction case and went above and beyond to educate and guide me on the next steps. I truly appreciate the valuable insights he shared and can only imagine how resourceful it will be to work with him. Although I’m not in his jurisdiction, if I ever find myself closer to Meriden, he will be the first person I call. I highly recommend reaching out if you're looking for an attentive and knowledgeable lawyer. Certain qualities resonate with you after just a few minutes of conversation. Keep up the great work, Jon!

John was absolutely amazing. I went over my case with him and he really, really took the time to help me, I by the way, did call a few other attorneys and I couldn't get the time of day from them. All they cared about was the dollar. I am a partially disabled air force veteran..If anybody needs a good lawyer, ...one that really cares ...the money's not the only thing. You want to see John... Any veterans that read this? Please go see John, he really cares about vets..
I wish there was more good things I could say about him, but I think you get the point, absolutely use him...You will not be sorry...
I called left the message with the secretary the lawyer John Patrucco called back same day in and gave me a free consultation that was so helpful I will recommend him to my friends and family.
I called Jon with an affidavit issue. He was wonderful directing me about what I should do. He’s patient, kind and an excellent lawyer. I recommend Jon Patrucco highly!

Jon was so friendly and fantastic. He helped me gain a better understanding of next best steps after an eviction. He was patient and kind, although I didn’t end up needing a lawyer he still took out time out of his day to answer questions and help me.

Tried to contact several real estate attorneys  for a time sensitive issue and Jon was the only attorney to answer my calls! Gave me great advice and didn’t rush me off the phone. Appreciated the help very much, thanks Jon!
Awesome advice, Mr. Patrucco was patient, honest and answered all my questions. Amazing!!
Thank you, Jon!

Attorney Pattruco’s consultation was not only insightful but also practical, tailored to my specific situation. He took the time to explain the intricacies of the eviction process, ensuring I understood each step along the way. What stood out to me was his ability to break down complex legal jargon into easily digestible information, making me feel informed and empowered.
Great attorney. Goes above and beyond!

I called this office for a consultation on some  estate issues I have been having. Spoke to Jon and he was so helpful and knowledgeable. He gave me some very helpful advice and if I was to hire an attorney he would be the one. Very thankful!

Jon was incredibly helpful to me! We called first thing in the morning he got back to me within an hour. He gave us the confidence to move forward with an unexpected loss. Would recommend him to anyone! Will be a returning customer for any future legal needs
Very helpful and kind, took the time to hear my story and point me in the right direction to finish my probate journey during a hard time

I reached out to him for help in purchasing property. He is very knowledgeable and helpful in his area of expertise! I will be using him soon to complete my property purchase. I highly recommend you to use him too!!!
Very professional and polite. Gave me some information about my case right away even though he wasn’t able to take my case. Would highly recommend.

He was so nice and attentive. He gave me a consult immediately and didn't rush me through my questions. He heard what I had to say and had excellent advice. I will definitely call him again if I need further assistance.
Jon is a professional. He answered my phone call and answered all my questions. He was very kind and responsive. I highly recommend John for all your legal questions.
Very professional gave me the most information and help then anyone else I've been calling and talked to in the past 2 months about my landlord issues.
Very helpful with legal information regarding my slumlord(landlord)

Mr. Patrucco gave me some really important information regarding my situation. His expertise was phenomenal. He took his time and explained what it is I must do to find the best solution to my situation. Very personable. I highly recommend his services.
Super helpful and personable. Took time from his day to answer my questions.

I had an amazing experience with Jon Patrucco. I have been having legal issues with my landlord and everyone I called to help refused to help tenants or just keep sending me to a different number. When I finally found Jon on Google his secretary was very polite and took my name to leave him a message. He called me back very quickly and gave me free legal advice that has helped me a lot . If my case continues to escalate I would definitly choose him as my attorney. He is polite knowledgeable and professional . He’s honest and seems to really want to help out . Thank you so much for the help
Very helpful and answered all my questions!

Amazing professionalism, talked to me about my case and gave me the best advice anyone has given me about my issues, I would highly recommend Jon, he is not only about the money I can tell he genuinely likes to help people.

Mr. Patrucco was nice enough to give me legal advice over the phone about a problem that I am having with my Landlord. He was very patient and knowledgeable and spent 10 minutes on the phone with me giving me all my options (free of charge).  Great guy!

Wow, what a amazing and genuine person. I called for some family law services and although he wasn’t taking those types of cases he still guiding in the right direction as much as possible as well as some references to other lawyers who specialize in family law. So grateful and feel much better about my situation and will keep him in mind for future services. Seriously thankful.
Great advice Answered in a timely mannered was understanding and was compassionate and very eager to see results with my issues.

I called Jon with a question that I really needed help with he was absolutely great! He gave me all the answers and information that I needed and I would definitely recommend him to someone in need of a real estate lawyer!
Just would like to thank you for answering all my questions. He was very informative and helpful. Would definitely recommend.
Good lawyer

I had an amazing experience with Jon Patrucco, he's very hands on my case and always keep me inform with any information. He made me feel like I was part of his family. At that moment I knew that he would take care of me.
Excellent to work. Helped establish estate documents for my mom. Would recommend
Attorney patrucco is a blessing in disguise.  His information was spot on . He listened patiently and with compassion to my concerns. A true professional in the right field .
Jon was very patient and answered all my questions.
Jon is a great Attorney and a great guy.
