reviews.text: Mike Culkin was always available to answer my questions and concerns. Mike got back to me quickly and made it a seamless operation. He put me at ease throughout the legal process.

Mike Culkin is a standup guy and exactly the person you want by your side when you’re facing a tough time. He is the ultimate professional, compassionate, smart and knows how to expertly navigate the complexities of the legal system. If you need help, Mike is the person to call.

I was referred to Attorney Culkin by a good friend. He handled our case well. He explained everything and answered any questions we had. Attorney Culkin collected all the information he needed from us, confirmed it and, was not afraid to speak up for us in court. He worked quickly. Getting our case resolved fast! When they tried to drag out an unsuccessful case. In fact maybe they would not of had a case at all or it could have went against our favor if he had not convinced us to sign papers and cooperate. He was straight to the point which we appreciated in the end. Thank you Attorney Culkin!

Attorney Culkin promptly responded to my request for a consultation and provided an encyclopedic explanation of my options - without hesitation. By answering my questions and concerns with such comprehensive detail, I felt confident in his ability to handle my case.

I would absolutely seek out his services for complex legal matters.

Thank you very much for your time, patience, and service.

Being a client of Mike Culkin was honestly a pleasure. I was very anxious with my legal situation and really had no clue how it would turn out for me, but Mike was very calming, and walked me through the process from beginning to the completion of my case.

He paid great attention to detail, and worked directly work the court officials to make sure my case was handled correctly. He was very thorough in making sure we took care of everything we needed to as the process progressed.

He was also very fair with price to attain his services. As much as a bad reputation attorneys have, Mike Culkin is an amazing guy, and wonderful human being in a world where everyone doesn't shown concern for their fellow human benigs.
He's serious and really fights for you

I was in a pinch and on short notice Mike Culkin was nothing short of amazing. He was very fair in his charge for his services.  He was on top of everything and I would absolutely recommend his services.  Very professional and knowledgeable.  He saved my life. Thanks for your dedication and hard work. 🙏

Called and had an initial meeting with paralegal about divorce... was told I had to put a deposit when I came to speak to lawyer which was fine when it was time to meet lawyer and he was not at office NO ONE WAS IT WAS CLOSED. Tried to call and reschedule and got no response and never a call back!!! Terrible if this is how business is done I’m happy you didn’t show up !! So unprofessional!

Attorney Culkin assisted me with a recent transaction and couldn't have been more accommodating, responsive, and effective. Not only did he make a long drive for my convenience, but he was personally responsive all day by phone, even past business hours to make sure our transaction was completed successfully before the weekend. I was clearly a person to him, not a number. He truly went above and beyond to meet my needs, and I am very grateful for his efforts. I recommend him without reservation.
Mike was very honest and accomplished everything he said he would do.Very professional and great prices.

My experience with hem was very welcoming makes me feel like I was important and took my situation very serious by addressing my point of view at court if I t wasn’t cause of hem I wouldn’t never got this Far with my kid as I am now thank you Micheal Culkin we are very happy and grateful with you.

Mike has been my lawyer for years, we have a great relationship and he’s always been there for me. He’s very professional in the court room always has great advice and does his job very well. He’s very communicative, generous with his time and always goes above and beyond for his clients. I would give him 10 stars if I could.

Mike Culkin did an amazing job on my case! I had the pleasure of also dealing with Kathy and both were patient with my million of questions and kind and knowledgeable! What a blessing to be able to have them when i needed them! Recommended to many family and friends!!!! 5 stars is a understatement!

Michael Culkin has become what I would call a “family asset”. He has helped me & my family through some of the most complicated, incredibly stressful-heart-wrenching times of our lives. Besides being a nice down-to-earth guy, he is passionate about his job, hardworking for his clients, and very reassuring with all concerns that his clients may have. His compassion for such delicate cases is so endearing for a lawyer to have and is very rare. Most lawyers tend to come off very cold and make you feel unimportant (like you’re just another case to them), but Michael does not. What I also appreciate about his services, is that it’s a family business and everyone comes together nicely to prepare and win the case at hand. I would highly recommend Michael Culkin as a lawyer to represent you for all your legal needs. He is very experienced in various areas of the law (I have used him for all sort of personal legal matters). My family and I thank him to this day, for being a blessing in our lives and will continue to use him to represent us, if we ever need him in the future.

Michael Culkin
Father of 4 ~My experience with Michael Culkin. He is the best lawyer I’ve ever encountered! Many years ago, my wife used him to file a bankruptcy that actually went quite smoothly. Then I needed a lawyer for two separate child custody cases (both at the same time), so I decided to give him a try.

My findings:
Michael is extremely passionate about his profession and does not discriminate in any form (i.e., race, religion, socio-economic background, etc...) he’s a lawyer for all people.
He is patient, intelligent ,and is also willing to work with you. He always validates your opinion, then steers you in the right direction. He knows law extremely well and always looks at it from many angles. He is also reasonable in price and does not haggle you for every “red cent”, especially for every minute talking to him like most lawyers do! He has compassion for honest-hearted people. Before calling or texting him information related to our case, I always tried to have my thoughts together to save us both time. Truly, if I was wrong in someway with my thought process he would let me know and I appreciated this at the end of the day. He was always focused on what served the best interest of the children and getting all the facts.

Not to mention, you can reach him at the office, by email, text message or by phone. Great lawyers like him are always busy, but he will always get back to you in a timely manner. So it is nice that he provides many avenues to communicate with him. At times, I’ve provided him with evidence to better my case and after he reviews it he always got back to me through one of these communication methods. If he couldn’t use what I provided, he always reviewed it with me to help me understand the ins and outs according to the law. He will always tell you the honest truth if something is good or bad to help your case.

When I like to think of what a lawyer should be, it should be a person who upholds justice and believes in it and Michael does just that! He fights for what is right! I have had two separate court cases involving custody. Today, all four of my children live with me for the right reasons. Justice was accomplished by Michael putting up a fight. At times, there are many flaws with in the court system and Michael is extremely good at looking at things from all angles to accomplish justice. Especially when it comes to children, he has their best interest in mind, because they are innocent and their safety and health is what’s most important. My Children have even referred to Michael as a “super hero without a cape”. They are extremely happy and grateful with the outcome of their lives. If the best interest is truly what you seek for your children/child, then this is the right lawyer for you. He was a great representative for me and my family and will be for yours as well!

I hired Mike to deal with a custody case for my pre teen daughter. The cards were stacked against me as I’m a father in a woman state. Somehow Mike pulled off the impossible and was able to show the court how much better off my daughter was with me and got me custody of my daughter. My daughter and I found never be so happy

I really want to get this message out to people who are looking for legal representation. I hired attorney Culkin this past July to represent me in an on going custody case with my son. Not only did Mr. Culkin take and WIN my case, he did it with only 6 days to learn the details of my case and strategies before my court date. This man worked with me on every level, from finicialy to taking a personal intrest in how this nightmare was affecting my day to day life. When no one else wanted to take my case, when they all told me it was un winnable, Mike Stepped up! He worked tirelessly, texting me multiple times at 1AM because Mike was STILL in his office going over the case. So if your looking for legal help, I cannot stress this to you enough. Attorney Culkin is the absolute best decision you can make. He was not only a Godsend for me and my son, but I consider him a good friend to this day. Thank you again Mike!

I have had the pleasure of working with Attorney Culkin and I could not have asked for a more attentive, professional, empathetic attorney to guide myself and my family though a very difficult situation.  Attorney Culkin has gone above and beyond, working after hours and on the weekend in order to get us the answers we needed. He comes highly recommended and without hesitation top notch!
I’m confident this is a trustworthy firm with professionalism throughout. Top notch service and honest delivery to resolve. Highly trusted and recommended 100%.

A blessing in disguise is an accurate way to describe my experiences with The Culkin Law Firm.  I went to Mike by scanning the "yellow pages".  I needed his guidance with my divorce.  I was a "single" Mom with two young children to support and it was not an easy experience.  Mike was beyond generous with his time and showed extreme compassion and respect.  His concern for my children and the best way to obtain a healthy environment for them was sincere and obvious.  Unfortunately, after the divorce I had to call upon his services again for a Bankruptcy.  I received the same professional, understanding help by Mike and his staff.  His integrity is unquestionable.

When going through a divorce, you want a lawyer you can trust, shows compassion and empathy. I was able to turn to Mike for calm, sure guidance and phone calls/emails were returned without delay. Since this was a very troubling time for me--for different reasons--his no-nonsense style and knowledge of the law and the system were invaluable. Mike  made me feel valued and got me through one of the toughest times of my life. Thank you, Mike for everything! I would HIGHLY recommend Mike to anyone in need of his expertise. Def the best in the area by far!

Attorney Culkin was referred to me by a friend when I was going through a difficult time financially while raising two girls on my own. He always made me feel like he was also invested in the best interest of my children showing compassion and reassurance.
I was so happy with an outcome I had lost hope on but Mike made it happen.
Much appreciation!

If you want your money stolen and nothing done and your emails/texts/calls not returned then he’s your guy. I’ve never been conned before in my life until I met this attorney. I always thought I was a good judge of character but boy did he have me fooled. My significant other had his suspicions during our consultation because attorney Culkin bragged, a lot! But I can’t imagine any of it to be true after what we dealt with. I’m so happy we didn’t give a full retainer because we would of been out of even more money that we’ve been working hard to save. Truly I don’t understand how these kind of people sleep at night..
Thank you for your advice.
Excellent service and good attention

reviews.text:
Atty Thompson is great, very professional. He just needs new staff! Maria and Ana H. were very unprofressional and rude throughout entire case, they wouldn't return calls/texts/emails or relay messages to the attorney. The communication was just not there at all. Today I was left waiting for over 10 minutes at the front window. Maria looked twice over at me and continued working. I decided to sit down and call to let them know I was there since they couldn't acknowledge me before. She came out and tried to say she didn't see me before, then said she thought I was with another group (there was no one else in the lobby but myself the whole time I was there). When I called her out on her excuses and said she saw me and that she was just being rude, she said I was rude too. Don't be upset because you got called out for being a rude employee and just do your job going forward.

I would advise to avoid this Waterbury office altogether and go to the other location because the staff is unprofessional and unreliable. The only one really working there is Atty Thompson.

reviews.text:
Attorney Pilicy-Ryan handled a personal injury case for a direct family member of mine & they have asked me to help them write this review.

Erica was always on her "A" game, constantly and consistently communicated with me in a timely fashion, sometimes returning the calls after hours, or during one of her breaks during trial. She really is a dedicated personal injury lawyer, but more importantly she is compassionate and understanding of her clients. This attorney really took a specter of a case and turned it back around for the most desirable result one could imagine.  I would highly recommend her to any person looking for a quality, no-nonsense, direct and very talented personal injury attorney.

My family member had gone to another attorney closer to their home and the end result was less than desirable, pre-trial.  Most attorneys will not take on a case that is already in process with another attorney, but Erica did and really was the answer to alot of prayers & meditation.

I truly wish Google would let me write another review, just for her paralegal. It is important to mention her paralegal , Virginia Orzell. Virginia, because other than being an unbelievable human being, she is not easily shocked or otherwise taken aback by substantial details of the case where other people might find them too much to discuss. My family member was significantly injured and common every day facets of their life were affected, but Virginia was astute in taking great notes, communicating, reaching back out, and leaving detailed voice mails. She too would answer calls after hours or while home. In fact I think I got her one day bringing her family member somewhere at 5:30 and she still took the call!

Imagine that our case was Godzilla and was it being attacked by a large insurance company (Rodan). They really thought they had us there for about a year or so--but I saw the big billboard that said very clearly "Flood Law Firm" and called, thank goodness.  Well. Rodan thought they had Godzilla on the ropes, but in walks Erica Pilicy-Ryan with a big metaphorical trucking blue ray from the depth of her litigation soul and was like "Nope". Boom. And Rodan was held at bay, wishing he had never got into a fight with Godzilla in the first place.

My family member and I thank Erica for the outstanding practice of law and we hope that other "lost" clients come to her first. They will be more than happy that they did. No gimmicks. No funny billboards that make you chuckle. Just hard core law--for middle class folks like us. Thank you both.

reviews.text:
I cannot recommend Attorney Michelle Holmes highly enough. From the very first meeting, she was straightforward, honest, and incredibly knowledgeable. She took control of a complicated employment matter and immediately brought clarity and direction to the situation.
Michelle was responsive, strategic, and calm under pressure. She understood both the legal landscape and the practical realities involved, and she moved quickly when it mattered most. What stood out to me was her ability to cut through noise and focus on the outcome. Because of her leadership and professionalism, my case was resolved efficiently and far sooner than I expected.
If you are looking for an attorney who is sharp, responsive, and truly advocates for her clients, Michelle Holmes is someone you want in your corner.

Some of the staff here are extremely rude and unprofessional. They act as if they are doing clients a favor, when in reality they are being paid to provide a service. The overall attitude was dismissive and disrespectful. I am very disappointed with this establishment and the lack of professionalism shown. I would not recommend this place save yourself the disappointment and headache.

My mother had a consultation scheduled with this attorney today regarding her business. Unfortunately, the experience was extremely unprofessional.

The attorney who met with us was not Michelle, but another woman. She arrived approximately 25 minutes late to the appointment and did not apologize or acknowledge the delay, despite having previously told my mother that if she herself was not present exactly at 9:00 AM, there would be nothing she could do for her. This set an unprofessional tone from the start.

Upon entering the room, the first thing the attorney said was, “Who is this?” in reference to me, rather than greeting us or introducing herself. No effort was made to create a welcoming or professional environment.

When my mother expressed discomfort that no apology was given for the lateness, the attorney responded dismissively and told her that she could leave if she did not like it, stating that she had “come out of her way to help,” despite the fact that my mother was paying a $500 consultation fee.

Overall, this interaction was disrespectful, dismissive, and far below the standard of professionalism expected from someone in this field. This was one of the most unprofessional consultations we have ever experience Just disgusting.
Didn’t return the original phone call, rude, interrupted me constantly and was only after the $500 consult fee. Typical ambulance chaser.

My former employer recommended I have an attorney review a severance offer and I'm very happy that I did.  Michelle Holmes listened, researched, and in a very timely manner resolved any issues.  I would highly recommend calling her if you need help with employment law.

I talked to a few other attorneys before deciding to hire Michelle Holmes to help with my severance agreement—and I’m really glad I did. From the start, she took the time to really listen and understand my concerns, which made a big difference. She was sharp, responsive, and totally focused on getting the best possible outcome. Michelle got back to me quickly, kept me in the loop, and the final result was better than I expected. She's professional, tough when needed, and someone you definitely want in your corner. I’d absolutely recommend her to anyone needing solid legal support.
Wanted to charge me $500 for consultation! Not a way to help someone who just lost their job!!
Very rude and didn't care to listen or even hear me out kept cutting me off. Absolutely disgusting

reviews.text: Michelle Holmes, a woman of integrity, honesty and dedication to the law. If you want someone that truly cares about you, an attorney that dedicates their life to applying the law and will never give up on you - look no further than Michelle Holmes, the absolute best attorney that will fight to the end for YOU.
